title: Deep Pre-Alignment for VLMs
summary: Most Vision Language Models (VLMs) directly map outputs from ViT encoders to the LLM via a lightweight projector. While effective, recent analysis suggests this architecture suffers from an alignment challenge: visual features remain distant from the text space in the initial layers of the LLM, forcing the model to waste critical depth~\cite{zhang-etal-2024-investigating,artzy-schwartz-2024-attend} on superficial modality alignment rather than deep understanding and complex reasoning. In this work, we propose Deep Pre-Alignment (DPA), a novel architecture that replaces the standard ViT encoder with a small VLM as perceiver, ensuring visual features are deeply aligned with the text space of the target large language model. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of DPA. On the 4B parameter scale, DPA outperforms baselines by 1.9 points across 8 multimodal benchmarks, with gains widening to 3.0 points at the 32B scale. Moreover, by offloading alignment to the perceiver, DPA achieves a 32.9\% reduction in language capability forgetting over 3 text benchmarks. We further demonstrate that these gains are consistent across different LLM families including Qwen3 and LLaMA 3.2, highlighting the generality of our approach. Beyond performance, DPA also offers a seamless upgrade path for current VLM development, requiring only a modular replacement for the visual encoder with marginal computation overhead.

AI.tldr: 提出Deep Pre-Alignment (DPA)架构，用小型VLM替代标准ViT编码器作为感知器，实现视觉特征与LLM文本空间的深度预对齐，在4B和32B参数规模上分别提升1.9和3.0个百分点的多模态基准性能，并减少32.9%的语言能力遗忘。
AI.motivation: 现有Vision Language Models (VLMs)通过轻量投影器将ViT编码器输出直接映射到LLM，但近期分析表明这种架构存在对齐问题：视觉特征在LLM初始层仍与文本空间距离较远，导致模型将关键的早期层计算浪费在浅层的模态对齐而非深度理解与复杂推理上。
AI.method: 提出Deep Pre-Alignment (DPA)架构，用一个小型VLM替换标准ViT编码器作为感知器（perceiver），确保视觉特征在输入目标LLM之前就已与文本空间实现深度对齐，从而将模态对齐任务从LLM卸载到感知器模块。
AI.result: 在4B参数规模下，DPA在8个多模态基准上平均超越基线1.9个百分点；在32B规模下，优势扩大至3.0个百分点。同时在3个文本基准上减少32.9%的语言能力遗忘，且增益在不同LLM家族（Qwen3、LLaMA 3.2）上一致成立，仅带来可忽略的额外计算开销。
AI.conclusion: DPA通过模块化替换视觉编码器即可无缝升级现有VLM，有效解决模态对齐瓶颈，证明了将对齐任务前置到感知器阶段是提升多模态理解能力并减少语言能力遗忘的通用且高效的设计原则。

title: COPRA: Conditional Parameter Adaptation with Reinforcement Learning for Video Anomaly Detection
comment: Manuscript currently under review for publication
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have shown strong performance in video anomaly detection (VAD) while providing interpretable predictions. However, existing VLM-based VAD methods suffer from a fundamental mismatch between training and inference in both data distribution and model configuration. First, most approaches rely on static post-training adaptation, limiting generalization under distribution shifts such as unseen environments or anomaly types. Second, they train VLMs on sparse frames from long videos, but perform inference on densely sampled short segments, creating inconsistencies between training and testing. To address these limitations, we propose COPRA, a conditional parameter adaptation framework for VLM-based VAD. Instead of fixed prompts or shared parameter updates, COPRA generates input-specific parameter updates to dynamically adapt a frozen VLM for each video segment during both training and inference. Experiments show strong performance on standard VAD benchmarks, consistently outperforming static baselines in both in-domain and cross-domain settings. Moreover, COPRA generalizes beyond VAD to unseen tasks such as multiple-choice Video Question Answering and Dense Captioning. These results highlight COPRA as an effective weight-space generation framework for scalable, adaptive, and context-aware video understanding. The code will be released at https://github.com/THE-MALT-LAB/COPRA

AI.tldr: COPRA提出了一种基于条件参数自适应的框架，通过为每个视频片段生成输入特定的参数更新来动态适配冻结的视觉-语言模型，解决了视频异常检测中训练与推理在数据分布和模型配置上的不一致问题，在多个基准上超越了静态基线方法，并泛化至视频问答和密集描述等下游任务。
AI.motivation: 现有基于VLM的视频异常检测方法存在两个关键局限：一是依赖静态后训练适配，在遇到未见环境或异常类型等分布偏移时泛化能力受限；二是训练时使用稀疏帧而推理时使用密集采样短片段，导致训练与测试阶段在数据分布和模型配置上存在根本性不匹配。
AI.method: COPRA是一个条件参数自适应框架，不同于固定提示或共享参数更新，它在训练和推理阶段均为每个输入视频片段动态生成输入特定的参数更新，从而实现对冻结VLM的逐段动态适配，确保训练与推理的一致性。
AI.result: 在标准VAD基准上，COPRA在域内和跨域设置下均一致超越静态基线方法；此外，该方法还能泛化到未见任务，如多项选择视频问答和密集描述，展现了其作为通用权重空间生成框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: COPRA通过条件参数自适应有效解决了VLM在视频异常检测中训练与推理的不匹配问题，不仅提升了VAD的性能和域泛化能力，还展示了向其他视频理解任务迁移的潜力，为可扩展、自适应、上下文感知的视频理解提供了新的框架思路。

title: ELDOR: A Dataset and Benchmark for Illegal Gold Mining in the Amazon Rainforest
summary: Illegal gold mining in the Amazon rainforest causes deforestation, water contamination, and long-term ecosystem disruption, yet remains difficult to monitor at fine spatial scales. Satellite imagery supports large-scale observation, but often misses small mining-related structures and subtle land-cover transitions, especially under frequent cloud cover. We introduce ELDOR, a large-scale UAV benchmark for monitoring environmental and landscape disturbance from illegal gold mining in the rainforest. ELDOR contains manually annotated orthomosaic imagery covering over 2,500 hectares, with pixel-level semantic labels for both mining-related activities and surrounding ecological structures. With this unified annotation source, we establish four benchmark tasks: semantic segmentation, segmentation-derived recognition, direct multi-label classification, and class-presence recognition with vision-language models. Across these tasks, we compare generic and remote-sensing-specific segmentation models, vision foundation model-related segmentation methods, direct multi-label classification methods, and vision-language models under a controlled closed-set protocol. Results show that current methods still struggle with rare small-scale mining structures and fine-grained recovery classes, suggesting the need for context-aware and multimodal modeling. To support domain analysis and practical use, we further build an interactive explorer for domain experts that provides a unified interface for data exploration and model inference.

AI.tldr: ELDOR是一个大规模无人机航拍基准数据集，覆盖亚马逊雨林2500多公顷区域并包含像素级标注，用于监测非法金矿开采导致的环境与景观扰动；通过四项基准任务评估现有方法，发现它们在检测小尺度矿区结构和精细恢复类别方面仍存在显著不足。
AI.motivation: 非法金矿开采在亚马逊雨林中造成毁林、水污染及生态系统长期破坏，但现有基于卫星影像的监测方法难以捕获小尺度采矿结构和细微的土地覆盖变化，且常受云层覆盖影响，缺乏高空间分辨率、多类别语义标注的基准数据集来支撑精细尺度的自动化监测研究。
AI.method: ELDOR数据集包含2500多公顷的手动标注正射镶嵌影像，提供像素级语义标签，涵盖采矿相关活动与周围生态结构；基于该数据集建立了四个基准任务：语义分割、分割导出的目标识别、直接多标签分类、以及基于视觉语言模型的类别存在性识别；比较了通用与遥感专用分割模型、视觉基础模型相关的分割方法、直接多标签分类方法以及封闭集协议下的视觉语言模型。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，现有方法在检测罕见的小尺度采矿结构以及细粒度恢复类别方面仍表现不佳，揭示了当前方法在这类精细遥感监测任务中的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究指出了现有方法在复杂环境监测任务中的不足，并强调了开发上下文感知和多模态建模方法的必要性；此外，研究构建的交互式数据探索与模型推理平台为领域专家提供了实用的分析工具。

title: EgoExo-WM: Unlocking Exo Video for Ego World Models
summary: Egocentric world models present a promising direction for enabling agents to predict and plan, but their performance is constrained by the limited availability of egocentric training data and its inherent partial observability of humans' physical actions. In contrast, exocentric video is abundant and reveals body poses well, but lacks direct alignment with an agent's action space -- and is not egocentric. We propose a method to bridge this gap by extracting structured body pose from exocentric video as a representation of action and transforming the exocentric video to egocentric video, informed by a human kinematics prior. This process unlocks the integration of in-the-wild exocentric data for egocentric world model training. We show that training whole-body action-conditioned egocentric world models with our converted data significantly improves both prediction quality and downstream planning performance, where we infer the sequence of body poses needed to achieve a visual goal state. Our approach paves the way to enlist arbitrary in-the-wild videos for building powerful egocentric world models, furthering applications in robot planning and augmented-reality guidance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过从外视角视频中提取结构化人体姿态并将其转换为自我中心视角视频的方法，以利用海量外视角数据训练自我中心世界模型，显著提升了预测质量和下游规划性能。
AI.motivation: 自我中心世界模型的性能受限于自我中心训练数据的稀缺以及其本身对人体物理动作的部分可观测性，而外视角视频虽然丰富且能清晰呈现人体姿态，但缺乏与智能体动作空间的直接对齐且并非自我中心视角，如何桥接这一差距是核心研究问题。
AI.method: 提出一种桥接方法，通过从外视角视频中提取结构化人体姿态作为动作表示，并基于人体运动学先验将外视角视频转换为自我中心视频，从而解锁利用任意野外外视角数据训练自我中心世界模型的能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用转换后的外视角数据训练全身动作条件下的自我中心世界模型，在预测质量和下游规划性能上均取得显著提升，模型能够推断出实现视觉目标状态所需的人体姿态序列。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为利用任意野外视频构建强大的自我中心世界模型铺平了道路，可进一步应用于机器人规划和增强现实引导等任务。

title: Always Learning, Always Mixing: Efficient and Simple Data Mixing All The Time
summary: Data mixing decides how to combine different sources or types of data and is a consequential problem throughout language model training. In pretraining, data composition is a key determinant of model quality; in continual learning and adaptation, it governs what is retained and acquired. Yet existing data mixing methods address only one phase of this lifecycle at a time: some require smaller proxy models tied to a single training phase, others assume a fixed domain set, and continual learning lacks principled guidance altogether. We argue that data mixing is fundamentally an online decision making problem -- one that recurs throughout training and demands a single, unified solution. We introduce OP-Mix (On-Policy Mix), a data mixing algorithm that operates across the entire language model training lifecycle. Our main insight is that candidate data mixtures can be cheaply simulated by interpolating between low-rank adapters trained directly on the current model, eliminating separate proxy models and ensuring the search is always grounded in the model's actual learning dynamics. Across pretraining, continual midtraining, and continual instruction tuning, OP-Mix consistently finds near-optimal mixtures while using a fraction of the compute of the baselines. In pretraining, OP-Mix improves upon training without mixing by 6.3% in average perplexity. For continual learning, OP-Mix matches the performance of both retraining and on-policy distillation while using 66% and 95% less overall compute, respectively. OP-Mix suggests a different view of language model training: not a sequence of distinct phases, but a single continuous process of learning from data.

AI.tldr: OP-Mix提出了一种统一的数据混合方法，将数据混合视为在线决策问题，通过在当前模型上训练的低秩适配器之间插值来廉价模拟候选数据混合，在预训练、持续中训练和持续指令微调三个阶段均能以极少计算量找到近乎最优的混合策略。
AI.motivation: 现有的数据混合方法仅针对语言模型训练生命周期中的单一阶段（如预训练或持续学习），有的依赖小型代理模型且受限于单一阶段，有的假设固定的领域集合，而持续学习领域更是缺乏原则性指导，缺乏一种能够贯穿整个训练生命周期的统一数据混合解决方案。
AI.method: OP-Mix将数据混合形式化为在线决策问题，其核心创新在于通过在当前模型上直接训练多个低秩适配器（LoRA）来模拟不同候选数据混合的效果，然后通过在这些适配器之间插值来廉价评估混合策略，从而避免了额外的代理模型，确保搜索始终基于模型当前的实际学习动态。
AI.result: 在预训练中，OP-Mix相比无混合训练在平均困惑度上提升了6.3%；在持续学习场景中，OP-Mix在匹配重训练和在线蒸馏性能的同时，分别节省了66%和95%的总计算量，证明了其在多个训练阶段均能以极低计算开销找到近乎最优的数据混合方案。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出了一种将语言模型训练视为单一连续数据学习过程的新视角，而非一系列独立的阶段；OP-Mix的统一框架表明数据混合可以高效地在线求解，为跨训练生命周期的数据管理提供了原则性和实用性的解决方案。

title: DeepSlide: From Artifacts to Presentation Delivery
summary: Presentations are a primary medium for scholarly communication, yet most AI slide generators optimize the artifact (a visually plausible deck) while under-optimizing the delivery process (pacing, narrative, and presentation preparation). We present DeepSlide, a human-in-the-loop multi-agent system that supports preparing the full presentation process, from requirement elicitation and time-budgeted narrative planning, to evidence-grounded slide--script generation, attention augmentation, and rehearsal support. DeepSlide integrates (i) a controllable logical-chain planner with per-node time budgets, (ii) a lightweight content-tree retriever for grounding, (iii) Markov-style sequential rendering with style inheritance, and (iv) sandboxed execution with minimal repair to ensure renderability. We further introduce a dual-scoreboard benchmark that cleanly separates static artifact quality from dynamic delivery excellence. Across 20 domains and diverse audience profiles, DeepSlide matches strong baselines on artifact quality while consistently achieving larger gains on delivery metrics, improving narrative flow, pacing precision, and slide--script synergy with clearer attention guidance.

AI.tldr: DeepSlide 是一个人类参与的多智能体系统，从需求获取、时间预算叙事规划、证据驱动的幻灯片与脚本生成、注意力增强到排练支持，全面优化学术演示的交付过程；其在保持静态成品质量与强基线相当的同时，在叙事流畅度、节奏精度和幻灯片-脚本协同等动态交付指标上取得了一致性提升。
AI.motivation: 现有 AI 幻灯片生成工具大多优化成品视觉质量，而忽视了演示交付过程中的节奏控制、叙事结构和讲稿准备等关键环节，导致生成的幻灯片虽然在视觉上合理但缺乏对实际演讲效果的支持。
AI.method: DeepSlide 构建了一个包含多个组件的多智能体系统：可控逻辑链规划器分配每节点时间预算；轻量级内容树检索器实现证据 grounding；马尔可夫式序列渲染与样式继承保证视觉一致性；沙箱化执行与最小修复确保可渲染性。系统通过人类参与实现全过程迭代优化。
AI.result: 在 20 个领域和多样化受众画像上的实验表明，DeepSlide 在幻灯片静态成品质量上与强基线方法持平，同时在叙事流畅度、节奏精度、幻灯片-脚本协同及注意力引导等动态交付指标上取得了一致且更大的提升。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了学术演示自动化的关键落点应从成品优化转向交付过程优化，并提出了一个可量化的双记分板基准以分离评估静态成品质量与动态交付质量，为 AI 辅助演示系统设定了新的研究范式。

title: DiffVAS: Diffusion-Guided Visual Active Search in Partially Observable Environments
summary: Visual active search (VAS) has been introduced as a modeling framework that leverages visual cues to direct aerial (e.g., UAV-based) exploration and pinpoint areas of interest within extensive geospatial regions. Potential applications of VAS include detecting hotspots for rare wildlife poaching, aiding search-and-rescue missions, and uncovering illegal trafficking of weapons, among other uses. Previous VAS approaches assume that the entire search space is known upfront, which is often unrealistic due to constraints such as a restricted field of view and high acquisition costs, and they typically learn policies tailored to specific target objects, which limits their ability to search for multiple target categories simultaneously. In this work, we propose DiffVAS, a target-conditioned policy that searches for diverse objects simultaneously according to task requirements in partially observable environments, which advances the deployment of visual active search policies in real-world applications. DiffVAS leverages a diffusion model to reconstruct the entire geospatial area from sequentially observed partial glimpses, which enables a target-conditioned reinforcement learning-based planning module to effectively reason and guide subsequent search steps. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DiffVAS excels in searching diverse objects in partially observable environments, significantly surpassing state-of-the-art methods on several datasets.

AI.tldr: DiffVAS提出了一种基于扩散模型与目标条件强化学习的视觉主动搜索框架，能够在部分可观测环境中同时搜索多种目标类别，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉主动搜索（VAS）方法假设整个搜索空间已知且固定，这在现实中因视野受限和高采集成本而难以成立；同时，它们通常针对单一目标学习策略，无法同时搜索多种目标类别。本文旨在解决在部分可观测环境中进行多目标联合搜索的实际部署问题。
AI.method: DiffVAS采用扩散模型从顺序观测的部分片段中重建整个地理空间区域，并将重建结果输入基于目标条件的强化学习规划模块，以有效推理并引导后续搜索步骤，从而实现对多种目标类别的联合搜索。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的大量实验表明，DiffVAS在部分可观测环境中搜索多种目标对象的表现显著超越了当前最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: DiffVAS通过结合扩散模型重建与目标条件强化学习，有效推动了视觉主动搜索策略在真实世界中的应用，为在复杂、部分可观测环境下的多目标搜索任务提供了可行的解决方案。

title: SDOF: Taming the Alignment Tax in Multi-Agent Orchestration with State-Constrained Dispatch
summary: Multi-agent orchestration frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, and CrewAI route tasks through graph-based pipelines but do not enforce the stage constraints that govern real business processes. We present SDOF, a framework that treats multi-agent execution as a constrained state machine. SDOF operates through two primary defensive layers, implemented by three components: (1) an Online-RLHF Specialized Intent Router trained via Generative Reward Modeling (GRPO) and (2) a StateAwareDispatcher with GoalStage finite-automaton checks and precondition/postcondition SkillRegistry validation for auditable execution control. On a recruitment system backed by the Beisen iTalent platform (6000+ enterprises), 185 expert-curated scenarios trigger 1671 live API calls. Our GSPO-aligned 7B Intent Router achieves higher joint accuracy than zero-shot GPT-4o on this FSM-constrained adversarial routing benchmark (80.9% versus 48.9%). In end-to-end execution, SDOF reaches 86.5% task completion (95% confidence interval 80.8 to 90.7) and blocks all 22 operations in the injection, illegal HR subset. Under a broader message-level blocking audit, SDOF attains precision 100% and recall 88%, expert agreement kappa=0.94. A separate evaluation on 960 SGD-derived dialogues spanning 8 service domains surfaces 201 stage-order conflicts under our FSM mapping, 41 of which arise in the normal split. This arXiv version reports the current validated scope; extended multi-seed training comparisons and deeper workflow evaluations will be released in a subsequent update.

AI.tldr: SDOF是一个将多智能体执行建模为受约束状态机的框架，通过在线RLHF意图路由器与状态感知调度器两大防御层，在基于Beisen iTalent平台的招聘系统中实现86.5%任务完成率、100%精确率和88%召回率，其7B模型在对抗性路由基准上以80.9%联合准确率显著超越零样本GPT-4o的48.9%。
AI.motivation: 现有LangChain、LangGraph、CrewAI等多智能体编排框架将任务通过图状流水线进行路由，但未能强制执行业务流程中关键的阶段约束（stage constraints），导致在真实业务场景下缺乏可审计的执行控制和安全性保障。
AI.method: SDOF将多智能体执行建模为受约束状态机，包含两个防御层由三个组件实现：(1) 基于在线RLHF的专用意图路由器，通过生成式奖励建模（GRPO/GSPO）训练；(2) 状态感知调度器（StateAwareDispatcher），包含GoalStage有限自动机检查和前/后置条件SkillRegistry验证，实现可审计的执行控制。
AI.result: 在基于Beisen iTalent平台（6000+企业）的招聘系统上，185个专家场景触发1671次实时API调用。GSPO对齐的7B意图路由器在FSM约束对抗路由基准上达到80.9%联合准确率，显著高于零样本GPT-4o的48.9%。端到端执行中SDOF达到86.5%任务完成率（95%置信区间80.8-90.7），拦截注入和非法HR子集所有22个操作；消息级拦截审计中精确率100%、召回率88%，专家一致性kappa=0.94。在960个跨8个服务领域的SGD对话中，FSM映射发现201个阶段顺序冲突，其中41个出现在正常分割中。
AI.conclusion: SDOF证明了将有限状态机约束引入多智能体编排可以有效强制执行业务阶段约束，在提升任务完成率的同时实现高精确度的安全拦截；该框架为构建可信、可审计的企业级多智能体系统提供了可行的范式。

title: RoiMAM: Region-of-Interest Medical Attention Model for Efficient Vision-Language Understanding
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) facilitate medical visual question answering (MedVQA) by jointly interpreting images and text. However, existing models typically depend on large architectures and closed-set answers, which limits their efficiency and potential clinical applicability. To overcome these shortcomings, we introduce RoiMAM, an efficient VLM. It integrates a training-free ROI Generation Module with Semantic Selective Suppression to focus on lesion-relevant regions, alongside a Text Prompt Enhancer module that provides modality-specific context without introducing training parameters. Compared to the widely used MedVInT-TD model, our design achieves efficient and accurate diagnosis at less than 20\% of the model size, while improving accuracy by approximately 2% on SLAKE and 4.6% on PMC-VQA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RoiMAM，一种高效视觉-语言模型，通过训练无关的ROI生成模块、语义选择性抑制和文本提示增强器，在模型参数量不到MedVInT-TD的20%的情况下，在SLAKE和PMC-VQA上分别提升约2%和4.6%的MedVQA准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型在医学视觉问答任务中通常依赖大规模架构和闭集答案，导致推理效率低下且临床适用性受限，亟需一种轻量且高效的解决方案。
AI.method: RoiMAM采用训练无关的ROI生成模块（结合语义选择性抑制机制）聚焦病灶相关区域，并引入文本提示增强器提供模态特定上下文；整个框架不引入额外训练参数，实现无参增强。
AI.result: 在SLAKE和PMC-VQA基准上，RoiMAM以不到MedVInT-TD模型20%的参数量，分别提升约2%和4.6%的问答准确率，展示了显著的效率与精度优势。
AI.conclusion: RoiMAM证明了通过轻量化设计（无训练ROI聚焦与文本提示增强）可在大幅压缩模型规模的同时提升MedVQA性能，为低资源临床场景下的高效VLM部署提供了可行路径。

title: SkillSmith: Compiling Agent Skills into Boundary-Guided Runtime Interfaces
summary: Recently, skills have been widely adopted in large language model (LLM)-based agent systems across various domains. In existing frameworks, skills are typically injected into the agent reasoning loop as contextual guidance once matched to a runtime task, enabling specialized task-solving capabilities. We find that this execution paradigm introduces two major sources of redundancy: irrelevant context injection and repeated skill-specific reasoning and planning. To this end, we propose SkillSmith, a boundary-first compiler-runtime framework that compiles skill packages offline into minimal executable interfaces. By extracting fine-grained operational boundaries from skills, SkillSmith enables agents to dynamically access and execute only the relevant components at runtime, thereby minimizing unnecessary context injection and redundant reasoning overhead. In the evaluation on SkillsBench benchmark, SkillSmith reduces solve-stage token usage by 57.44%, thinking iterations by 42.99%, solve time by 50.57% (2.02x faster), and token-proportional monetary cost by 57.44% compared with using raw-skills. Moreover, compiled artifacts produced by a stronger model can be reused by a smaller or more efficient runtime model, improving task accuracy in cases where raw skill interpretation fails. The source code and data are available at https://github.com/AetherHeart-AI/Aeloon.

AI.tldr: SkillSmith提出了一种边界优先的编译器-运行时框架，通过从技能中提取细粒度操作边界，将技能包离线编译为最小可执行接口，在LLM智能体系统中同时减少无关上下文注入和重复推理规划两类冗余，在SkillsBench上实现了57.44%的token节省和2.02倍的求解加速。
AI.motivation: 现有基于技能的LLM智能体系统在执行时，技能被匹配后作为上下文指导注入智能体推理循环，导致两大冗余问题：一是无关上下文注入（大量技能信息被无差别加载），二是重复的技能特定推理与规划开销，亟需一种更高效的技能执行机制。
AI.method: SkillSmith提出边界优先的编译器-运行时框架：离线阶段将技能包编译为最小可执行接口，核心是从技能中提取细粒度操作边界；运行时阶段智能体仅动态访问和执行与当前任务相关的组件，从而最小化不必要的上下文注入和冗余推理开销。
AI.result: 在SkillsBench基准上，相比直接使用原始技能，SkillSmith在求解阶段token使用量减少57.44%，思考迭代次数减少42.99%，求解时间减少50.57%（加速2.02倍），token比例货币成本降低57.44%；同时，由更强模型编译的产物可被更小或更高效的运行时模型复用，在原始技能解释失败的情况下提升任务准确率。
AI.conclusion: 通过将技能从运行时的上下文指导解耦为离线编译的可执行接口，SkillSmith有效消除了LLM智能体系统中的两类冗余，显著提升执行效率和成本效益；编译产物的跨模型可迁移性进一步表明该框架具有良好的泛化性和实用性，为高效智能体系统设计提供了新思路。

title: MI-CXR: A Benchmark for Longitudinal Reasoning over Multi-Interval Chest X-rays
summary: Longitudinal chest X-ray (CXR) interpretation requires reasoning over disease evolution across multiple patient visits, yet most existing medical VQA benchmarks focus on single images or short-horizon image pairs. We introduce MI-CXR, a benchmark for standardized evaluation of Multi-Interval longitudinal reasoning over multi-visit CXR sequences, without requiring free-form report generation or additional clinical context. MI-CXR comprises five-way multiple-choice questions over five-visit patient timelines and instantiates three complementary task families: Temporal Event Localization, Interval-wise Change Reasoning, and Global Trajectory Summarization, which assess clinically grounded visual reasoning over time. Evaluating 14 state-of-the-art vision-language models (VLMs) shows low overall performance, with an average accuracy of 29.3%, only modestly above random guessing. Using stage-wise diagnostic probing, we find that models often produce locally plausible interval descriptions but fail to enforce temporal constraints or compose evidence into globally consistent decisions over the full timeline. These findings reveal key limitations of current VLMs and establish MI-CXR as a principled benchmark for longitudinal medical reasoning. The benchmark is available at https://github.com/AIDASLab/MI-CXR

AI.tldr: 提出了MI-CXR基准，用于评估多时间间隔胸部X光序列推理能力，测试了14个视觉语言模型，平均准确率仅29.3%，揭示了现有VLM在纵向医学推理中的关键缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有医学视觉问答基准大多局限于单张图像或短时距图像对，缺乏对多就诊次数胸部X光序列中疾病演变过程进行标准化评估的标准，制约了纵向医学推理能力的研究。
AI.method: 构建了MI-CXR基准，包含五轮就诊的患者时间线及五选一多项选择题，设计了三个互补任务族：时间事件定位、间隔变化推理和全局轨迹总结，用于评估临床时间视觉推理能力；并采用阶段式诊断探针分析模型行为。
AI.result: 在14个最先进视觉语言模型上评估，平均准确率仅29.3%，略高于随机猜测；阶段式诊断探针发现模型能生成本地合理的间隔描述，但无法施加时间约束或跨完整时间线组合证据形成全局一致的决策。
AI.conclusion: MI-CXR作为标准化纵向医学推理基准，揭示了当前VLM在多时间间隔序列推理中的根本性局限，为未来在时间连贯视觉推理方向上的模型改进提供了明确评估框架和诊断工具。

title: Response-Conditioned Parallel-to-Sequential Orchestration for Multi-Agent Systems
summary: Multi-agent systems can solve complex tasks through collaboration between multiple Large Language Model agents. Existing collaboration frameworks typically operate in either a parallel or a sequential mode. In the parallel mode, agents respond independently to queries followed by aggregation of responses. In contrast, sequential systems allow agents to communicate via a directed topology and refine one another step by step. However, both modes are inadequate for achieving the desired objectives of minimizing communication and latency while simultaneously maximizing the accuracy of the final response. In this work, we introduce a hybrid paradigm called Nexa, a trainable response-conditioned policy that bridges the gap between the two modes. Nexa begins with a parallel execution stage, embeds the resulting responses into a shared semantic space, and then predicts a sparse directed acyclic communication graph. If the graph is empty, the system remains purely parallel; if it is non-empty, the system performs one sequential message propagation. The policy is a lightweight transformer model, and the method avoids the need for external LLM judges or reward models, as well as hand-crafted test-time topology search. We formalize this hybrid execution problem, show that the resulting graph is acyclic by construction, and that the framework strictly subsumes pure parallel execution, and present a training procedure based on policy-gradient optimization. Results demonstrate that the response-conditioned policy learned by Nexa under one setting can be reused when the number of agents, the task, or the underlying agent changes, thus emphasizing the generalizability of the learned communication policy.

AI.tldr: Nexa 提出了一种混合型多智能体协作范式，通过可训练的条件式通信策略在并行执行与顺序传播之间动态选择，在减少通信延迟的同时提升响应准确性，且策略具备跨任务、跨智能体的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型多智能体协作框架主要采用并行模式（独立响应后聚合）或顺序模式（按有向拓扑逐步精炼），但这两种模式都无法同时实现最小化通信开销与延迟以及最大化最终响应准确性的目标，二者之间存在根本性权衡。
AI.method: Nexa 提出一种可训练的响应条件式策略，以轻量级 Transformer 模型作为策略网络，首先执行并行阶段并将各智能体的响应嵌入共享语义空间，然后预测一个稀疏有向无环通信图；若图为空则保持纯并行，若非空则执行一轮顺序消息传播；该方法通过策略梯度优化训练，无需外部 LLM 评判器、奖励模型或手工设计的测试时拓扑搜索，且构造的图天然保证无环性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，Nexa 学习的响应条件式通信策略能够在智能体数量、任务类型或底层智能体发生变化时直接复用，充分证明了所学通信策略的强泛化能力，同时该框架在理论上严格包含纯并行执行作为其特例。
AI.conclusion: Nexa 通过将并行与顺序执行统一到一个可微的混合框架中，有效弥合了两种协作模式之间的鸿沟，其轻量级策略网络和策略梯度训练方式避免了对外部评估模型的依赖，且学习到的通信策略具有良好的迁移性与泛化性，为多智能体系统中的高效协作提供了新思路。

title: ICRL: Learning to Internalize Self-Critique with Reinforcement Learning
summary: Large language model-based agents make mistakes, yet critique can often guide the same model toward correct behavior. However, when critique is removed, the model may fail again on the same query, indicating that it has not internalized the critique's guidance into its underlying capability. Meanwhile, a frozen critic cannot improve its feedback quality over time, limiting the potential for iterative self-improvement. To address this, we propose learning to internalize self-critique with reinforcement learning(ICRL), a novel framework that jointly trains a solver and a critic from a shared backbone to convert critique-induced success into unassisted solver ability. The critic is rewarded based on the solver's subsequent performance gain, incentivizing actionable feedback. To address the distribution shift between critique-conditioned and critique-free behavior, ICRL introduces a distribution-calibration re-weighting ratio that selectively transfers critique-guided improvements compatible with the solver's own prompt distribution. Additionally, a role-wise group advantage estimation stabilizes joint optimization across the two roles. Together, these mechanisms ensure that the solver learns to improve itself without external critique, rather than becoming dependent on critique-conditioned behavior. We evaluate ICRL on diverse benchmarks spanning agentic and mathematical reasoning tasks, using Qwen3-4B and Qwen3-8B as backbones. Results show consistent improvements, with average gains of 6.4 points over GRPO on agentic tasks, and 7.0 points on mathematical reasoning. Notably, the learned 8B critic is comparable to 32B critics while using substantially fewer tokens. The code is available at https://github.com/brick-pid/ICRL.

AI.tldr: 提出ICRL框架，通过强化学习联合训练求解器和评论家共享同一骨干网络，使模型能够将外部批评指导内化为无需批评的独立能力，在智能体和数学推理任务上分别取得平均6.4和7.0个百分点的提升，且8B评论家性能可媲美32B评论家。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型智能体在批评指导下虽能纠正错误，但移除批评后模型在相同查询上仍会失败，说明批评指导未被内化为模型的底层能力；同时，冻结的评论家无法随时间提升反馈质量，限制了迭代自我改进的潜力。
AI.method: 提出ICRL框架，从共享骨干网络出发联合训练求解器和评论家两个角色；评论家根据求解器后续性能增益获得奖励以激励可操作的反馈；引入分布校准重加权比（distribution-calibration re-weighting ratio）解决批评条件与无批评行为之间的分布偏移；提出角色组优势估计（role-wise group advantage estimation）稳定联合优化过程。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-4B和Qwen3-8B骨干网络上，ICRL在智能体和数学推理任务上相比GRPO分别取得平均6.4和7.0个百分点的提升；训练得到的8B评论家在性能上可媲美32B评论家，且使用显著更少的token。
AI.conclusion: ICRL框架有效实现了批评指导的内部化，使求解器在无需外部批评的情况下实现自我改进而非依赖批评条件行为，为语言模型智能体的自我提升提供了可行的训练范式。

title: AGC: Adaptive Geodesic Correction for Adversarial Robustness on Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-language models like CLIP have demonstrated remarkable zero-shot transfer capabilities. However, their susceptibility to imperceptible adversarial perturbations remains a critical security concern. While test-time defenses offer a pragmatic solution for deployed models, existing approaches typically rely on gradient-based optimization during inference, incurring significant computational overhead. In this paper, we revisit the role of data augmentation in CLIP robustness and observe that augmentations are not equally effective: specific augmentations consistently provide robust geometric cues that align with correct class semantics in the hyperspherical feature space. Based on this, we propose Adaptive Geodesic Correction (AGC), a training-free defense mechanism that requires no parameter updates. AGC identifies a reliable augmentation as a geometric anchor and corrects the input feature towards it, utilizing an adaptive step size to balance robustness against clean accuracy preservation. AGC achieves superior performance across eight fine-grained datasets and three CLIP backbones, improving average robust accuracy by 44.4\% over state-of-the-art baseline while delivering a 10$\times$ reduction in inference latency. Our findings reveal a fundamental geometric property of CLIP features, offering a highly efficient and effective paradigm for robust multimodal deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AGC，一种无需训练、无需参数更新的CLIP防御机制，通过自适应几何校正利用特定数据增强提供的鲁棒几何线索，在8个细粒度数据集上实现平均鲁棒准确率提升44.4%，同时推理延迟降低10倍。
AI.motivation: CLIP等视觉语言模型对不可察觉的对抗扰动高度敏感，现有测试时防御方法依赖梯度优化，推理阶段计算开销过大，缺乏高效且有效的鲁棒部署方案。
AI.method: 提出Adaptive Geodesic Correction (AGC)，一种无训练防御机制；关键发现是不同数据增强对CLIP鲁棒性贡献不均，特定增强能提供与正确类别语义对齐的鲁棒几何线索；AGC选取可靠增强作为几何锚点，在超球特征空间中将输入特征向锚点方向校正，并采用自适应步长平衡鲁棒性与干净准确率。
AI.result: 在8个细粒度数据集和3种CLIP骨干网络上，AGC平均鲁棒准确率较最先进基线提升44.4%，推理延迟降低10倍，无需任何参数更新即可实现优于现有方法的防御性能。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了CLIP特征空间中存在一种基础几何性质，即特定增强可提供与正确语义对齐的稳定几何线索；AGC提供了一种高效、有效且无需训练的鲁棒多模态部署新范式。

title: VCG-Bench: Towards A Unified Visual-Centric Benchmark for Structured Generation and Editing
summary: Despite the rapid advancements in Vision-Language Models (VLMs), a critical gap remains in their ability to handle structured, controllable diagrammatic tasks essential for professional workflows. Existing methods predominantly rely on pixel-based synthesis, which operates in probabilistic pixel spaces and is inherently limited in editability and fidelity. Instead, we propose a new Diagram-as-Code paradigm with symbolic logic that leverages mxGraph Extensible Markup Language (XML) for precise diagram generation and editing. We present VCG-Bench, a unified benchmark for visual-centric \texttt{mxGraph} tasks. VCG-Bench comprises: (1) a taxonomized dataset of 1,449 diverse diagrams spanning 6 domains and 15 sub-domains, (2) a paradigm definition that integrates Generation (Vision-to-Code) and Editability (Code-to-Code), (3) a Tailored Evaluation Protocol employing multi-dimensional metrics such as \texttt{mxGraph} Execution Success Rate, Style Consistency Score (SCS), etc. Experimental results highlight the challenges faced by current State-of-the-Art (SOTA) VLMs in structured fidelity and instruction compliance, reflecting their vision and reasoning capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Diagram-as-Code范式，利用mxGraph XML实现精确、可编辑的图表生成，并构建了VCG-Bench基准，实验表明现有VLM在结构化保真度和指令遵循方面仍存在显著不足。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在处理结构化、可控的图表任务时能力不足，主流基于像素的合成方法在概率像素空间中操作，存在可编辑性差、保真度低等根本性局限。
AI.method: 提出Diagram-as-Code范式，采用mxGraph XML进行符号化图表生成与编辑；构建VCG-Bench统一基准，包含1,449张跨6领域15子领域的分类化图表数据集，定义Vision-to-Code（生成）和Code-to-Code（可编辑性）两大任务，并设计多维度评估协议，包括mxGraph执行成功率、风格一致性分数（SCS）等指标。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，当前最先进的视觉语言模型在结构化保真度和指令遵循方面面临显著挑战，反映出其在视觉与推理能力上的局限性。
AI.conclusion: Diagram-as-Code范式通过符号化表示有效克服了像素合成方法在可编辑性和保真度上的固有缺陷，VCG-Bench为评估VLM在可控图表任务上的能力提供了标准化框架，揭示了现有模型在该方向上的性能瓶颈。

title: Pretraining Objective Matters in Extreme Low-Data FGVC: A Backbone-Controlled Study
comment: Presented at the 13th Workshop on Fine-Grained Visual Categorization (FGVC13) at CVPR 2026
summary: Extreme low-data fine-grained classification is common in expert domains where labeling is expensive, yet practitioners still need principled guidance for selecting pretrained encoders. We study emerald inclusion grading with a custom dataset of labeled images across three classes and ask: under matched backbone capacity, how does pretraining objective affect downstream representation quality? We compare four frozen ViT-B/16 encoders trained with supervised classification, contrastive learning (SigLIP2), masked reconstruction (MAE), and self-distillation (DINOv3), and evaluate them with leave-one-out cross-validation using linear and nonlinear probes. To control statistical noise in the low-N regime, we use permutation testing (N=1000) on macro one-vs-rest AUC. Supervised and contrastive encoders provide the strongest linear separability (logistic AUC: 0.768 and 0.735; SVM AUC: 0.739 and 0.697), while MAE improves under nonlinear probes (XGBoost AUC: 0.713). We find that DINOv3 underperforms across probe families in this domain. These results support a practical recommendation for extreme low-data FGVC: prioritize margin-enforcing pretraining objectives when data scarcity restricts probing to linear decision rules, and consider reconstruction-style encoders when nonlinear classifiers are feasible given dataset constraints.

AI.tldr: 在极端低数据细粒度分类场景下，通过比较四种预训练目标（监督、对比、掩码重建、自蒸馏）的冻结ViT-B/16编码器，发现监督和对比学习编码器在线性探测中表现最优，而MAE在非线性探测下有所改善，DINOv3表现最差，从而为低数据场景下的编码器选择提供了实用指导。
AI.motivation: 在专家领域（如宝石分级）中，标注成本高昂导致极端低数据细粒度分类问题普遍存在，但实践者缺乏关于如何选择预训练编码器的原则性指导，特别是当骨干网络容量匹配时，不同预训练目标对下游表示质量的影响尚不清晰。
AI.method: 使用自定义的三类标注图像数据集进行祖母绿内含物分级研究，比较四种冻结的ViT-B/16编码器（监督分类、SigLIP2对比学习、MAE掩码重建、DINOv3自蒸馏），采用留一法交叉验证结合线性（Logistic回归、SVM）和非线性（XGBoost）探测头进行评估，并通过置换检验（N=1000）在宏观一对多AUC上控制低N统计噪声。
AI.result: 监督和对比编码器在线性可分离性上表现最佳（Logistic AUC: 0.768和0.735；SVM AUC: 0.739和0.697），MAE在非线性探测下有所提升（XGBoost AUC: 0.713），DINOv3在所有探测族中均表现不佳。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，在极端低数据细粒度分类场景下，当数据稀缺限制探测仅能使用线性决策规则时，应优先选择强制边界（margin-enforcing）的预训练目标；当数据量允许使用非线性分类器时，可考虑重建类编码器。

title: DimMem: Dimensional Structuring for Efficient Long-Term Agent Memory
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents require long-term memory to leverage information from past interactions. However, existing memory systems often face a fidelity--efficiency trade-off: raw dialogue histories are expensive, while flat facts or summaries may discard the structure needed for precise recall. We propose \textbf{DimMem}, a lightweight dimensional memory framework that represents each memory as an atomic, typed, and self-contained unit with explicit fields such as time, location, reason, purpose, and keywords. This representation exposes the structure needed for dimension-aware retrieval, memory update, and selective assistant-context recall without storing full histories in the model context. Across LoCoMo-10 and LongMemEval-S, DimMem achieves \textbf{81.43\%} and \textbf{78.20\%} overall accuracy, respectively, outperforming existing lightweight memory systems while reducing LoCoMo per-query token cost by \textbf{24\%}. We further show that dimensional memory extraction is learnable by compact models: after fine-tuning on the DimMem schema, a Qwen3-4B extractor surpasses LightMem with GPT-4.1-mini on both benchmarks and reaches performance comparable to, or better than, much larger extractors in key settings. These results suggest that explicit dimensional structuring is an effective and efficient foundation for long-term memory in LLM agents. Code is available at https://github.com/ChowRunFa/DimMem.

AI.tldr: 提出DimMem，一种轻量级维度记忆框架，将记忆表示为原子化、带类型和自包含的单元（含时间、地点、原因、目的、关键词等显式字段），在不存储完整历史的情况下实现维度感知的检索、更新和选择性助理上下文召回，在LoCoMo-10和LongMemEval-S上分别达到81.43%和78.20%的整体准确率，并降低24%的每查询token成本。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM代理的长时记忆系统面临保真度-效率权衡：原始对话历史存储成本高昂，而扁平化的事实或摘要可能丢弃精确回忆所需的结构化信息，缺乏一种既能保持记忆结构化细节又轻量高效的记忆表示方案。
AI.method: 提出DimMem框架，将每条记忆设计为原子化、带类型和自包含的单元，包含时间、地点、原因、目的、关键词等显式维度字段；基于该维度化表示实现维度感知的检索、记忆更新和选择性助理上下文召回，避免在模型上下文中存储完整历史；进一步通过微调紧凑模型（Qwen3-4B）使其掌握DimMem模式的记忆提取能力。
AI.result: 在LoCoMo-10和LongMemEval-S上分别达到81.43%和78.20%的整体准确率，优于现有轻量级记忆系统；每查询token成本降低24%；经微调后的Qwen3-4B提取器在两个基准上超越LightMem（使用GPT-4.1-mini），并在关键设定下达到与更大规模提取器相当或更优的性能。
AI.conclusion: 显式维度结构化记忆是LLM代理中长时记忆的有效且高效的基础方案，表明通过紧凑模型即可学习维度记忆提取，为构建轻量级、高性能的代理记忆系统提供了新方向。

title: Solvita: Enhancing Large Language Models for Competitive Programming via Agentic Evolution
summary: Large language models (LLMs) still struggle with the rigorous reasoning demands of hard competitive programming. While recent multi-agent frameworks attempt to bridge this reliability gap, they remain fundamentally stateless: they rely on static retrieval and discard the valuable problem-solving and debugging experience gained from previous tasks. To address this, we present Solvita, an agentic evolution framework that enables continuous learning without requiring weight updates to the underlying LLM. Solvita reorganizes problem-solving into a closed-loop system of strategy selection, program synthesis, certified supervision, and targeted hacking, executed by four specialized agents: Planner, Solver, Oracle, and Hacker. Crucially, each agent is paired with a trainable, graph-structured knowledge network. As the system operates, outcome signals, such as pass/fail verdicts, test certification quality, and adversarial vulnerabilities discovered by the Hacker, are recast as reinforcement learning updates to these network weights. This allows the agents to dynamically route future queries based on past successes and failures, effectively accumulating transferable reasoning experience over time. Evaluated across CodeContests, APPS, AetherCode, and live Codeforces rounds, Solvita establishes a new state-of-the-art among code-generation agents, outperforming existing multi-agent pipelines and nearly doubling the accuracy of single-pass baselines.

AI.tldr: Solvita是一个无需更新LLM权重的持续学习框架，通过图结构知识网络和强化学习信号实现跨任务的推理经验积累，在多个编程竞赛基准上达到最先进水平。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型在解决高难度竞赛编程问题时推理能力仍然不足，而近年提出的多智能体框架本质上是无状态的，仅依赖静态检索且丢弃了先前任务中积累的问题求解与调试经验，缺乏跨任务的知识迁移与持续学习能力。
AI.method: Solvita提出了一种无需更新底层LLM权重的智能体进化框架，将问题求解组织为策略选择、程序合成、认证监督与定向破解的闭环系统，由Planner、Solver、Oracle、Hacker四个专用智能体执行；每个智能体配有一个可训练、图结构的知识网络，将通过/失败判定、测试认证质量以及Hacker发现的对抗性漏洞等结果信号作为强化学习更新信号来调整网络权重，从而基于历史成功与失败经验动态路由未来查询。
AI.result: 在CodeContests、APPS、AetherCode以及实时Codeforces竞赛上的评估表明，Solvita在代码生成智能体中达到了新的最先进水平，性能优于现有所有多智能体管线，且将单次通过基线的准确率几乎翻倍。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作表明，通过图结构知识网络与强化学习信号结合，可以在不更新LLM权重的情况下实现跨任务的持续学习和推理经验积累，为构建更具自适应性和进化能力的代码生成智能体提供了新的范式。

title: Neutral-Reference Prompting for Vision-Language Models
summary: Efficient transfer learning of vision-language models (VLMs) commonly suffers from a Base-New Trade-off (BNT): improving performance on unseen (new) classes often degrades accuracy on known (base) classes. Addressing how to boost recognition of unseen classes without sacrificing known-class performance remains a central challenge. Existing work often simplistically attributes the BNT to overfitting on known classes. We observe an interesting phenomenon: VLMs frequently exhibit asymmetric confusion on certain downstream data, i.e., samples of class A are systematically mispredicted as class B, while the reverse confusion (B to A) rarely occurs. For known classes, this kind of bias can be mitigated by tuning using a cross-entropy loss, but for unseen classes, such pretraining-induced bias persists and harms generalization. Motivated by this, we propose NeRP, a plug-and-play prompting correction strategy that improves discrimination on unseen classes without modifying model parameters. NeRP leverages neutral text prompts and reference images to measure class-wise prior preferences along the pre-trained inter-class geometry, and combines them with the sample likelihood to obtain the model's surrogate score. If, for a given sample, the prior strongly favors the current prediction while the observed evidence is clearly insufficient, we perform a local flip between easily confusable class pairs, thereby correcting prior-dominated mispredictions. Extensive experiments across multiple backbones and 15 few-shot and cross-domain benchmarks show that NeRP substantially improves accuracy on unseen classes while preserving known-class prediction performance.

AI.tldr: NeRP是一种即插即用的提示校正策略，通过利用中性提示和参考图像测量类间先验偏好，在保持基类性能不变的前提下显著提升视觉语言模型在新类上的识别准确率，有效缓解了基类-新类权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型在迁移学习中普遍存在基类-新类权衡问题（BNT），即提升新类识别准确率通常会降低基类性能。现有工作将该问题简单归因于对基类的过拟合，而本文发现一个关键现象：VLM在下游数据上存在系统性的非对称混淆偏差，即A类样本被系统性误判为B类，但反向混淆很少发生。这种预训练引入的偏差在基类上可通过交叉熵调优缓解，但在新类上持续存在并损害泛化能力。
AI.method: 本文提出NeRP，一种即插即用的提示校正策略，无需修改模型参数即可改善新类判别能力。NeRP首先利用中性文本提示和参考图像沿着预训练的类间几何结构测量类维度的先验偏好，将其与样本似然结合得到模型的替代分数。当样本的先验强烈偏向当前预测而观测证据明显不足时，NeRP在易混淆的类别对之间执行局部翻转，从而纠正由先验主导的误预测。
AI.result: 在多个骨干网络和15个少样本及跨域基准上的实验表明，NeRP在显著提升新类识别准确率的同时，能够保持基类预测性能不变，有效打破了基类-新类权衡困境。
AI.conclusion: 本文的核心洞见在于，VLM迁移学习中的BNT问题根源在于预训练引入的非对称类间混淆偏差，而非简单的基类过拟合。NeRP作为无需参数修改的即插即用策略，为缓解这一偏差提供了轻量级且有效的解决方案，揭示了利用类间几何结构进行先验校正的重要性。

title: Can Vision Language Models Be Adaptive in Mathematics Education? A Learner Model-based Rubric Study
summary: Adaptive learning refers to educational technologies that track learners' learning progress and adapt the instructional process based on individual learners' learning performance. It is increasingly recognized as critical for developing an effective learning support tool. Vision language models (VLMs) have seen adoption in mathematics education, and students have been using them as learning aids for personalized instruction. However, it is unknown whether VLMs have the ability to adapt to different learner profiles when providing mathematical instructions. Current VLMs lack a systematic evaluation framework for this adaptivity to different learner profiles in mathematics tutoring tasks. To address this gap, we draw on the learner model from the adaptive learning framework (Shute and Towle, 2018) and propose a learner model-based rubric. Our rubric formalizes adaptivity assessment into three aspects: cognitive aspects, motivational aspects, and complexity. We also evaluate two additional dimensions of VLM responses: correctness (of answers and solutions) and quality (of the response itself). Our experimental results show measurable differences in adaptivity across models and also reveal that current VLMs struggle to consistently produce learner model-based instructional responses, especially when receiving limited learner information.

AI.tldr: 本文针对视觉语言模型（VLM）在数学教学任务中无法根据学习者画像进行自适应教学的问题，借鉴自适应学习框架中的学习者模型，提出了一个包含认知、动机和复杂性三个维度的自适应评估标准，实验表明当前VLM在自适应响应方面表现不稳定，尤其在缺乏学习者信息时问题显著。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉语言模型（VLM）已广泛应用于数学教育领域并为学生提供个性化学习辅助，但现有研究缺乏系统性评估框架来衡量VLM是否具备根据不同学习者画像（learner profiles）调整数学教学指令的自适应能力，这一评估空白限制了自适应学习技术在真实教育场景中的有效部署。
AI.method: 借鉴自适应学习框架中的学习者模型（Shute and Towle, 2018），本文提出了一种基于学习者模型的评估量规（rubric），将自适应能力评估形式化为三个维度：认知方面、动机方面和复杂性；同时额外评估VLM响应的正确性（答案与解法）和响应质量两个维度。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，不同VLM在自适应能力上存在可测量的差异，且当前VLM难以一致地生成基于学习者模型的教学响应，尤其是在接收到的学习者信息有限时，自适应性能显著下降。
AI.conclusion: 本研究首次为VLM在数学教学任务中的自适应能力提供了系统化评估框架，揭示了现有模型在个性化教学响应方面的严重不足，为未来开发具有自适应能力的教育型VLM指明了改进方向。

title: Zero-Shot Goal Recognition with Large Language Models
comment: 9 pages, 1 figure, 1 table; appendix with 8 figures and 2 code listings (29 pages total); submitted to NeurIPS 2026
summary: Large language models have recently reached near-parity with classical planners on well-known planning domains, yet this competence relies on world-knowledge exploitation rather than genuine symbolic reasoning. Goal recognition is a complementary abductive task structurally better suited to LLM strengths: it consists of evaluating consistency with world knowledge rather than generating novel action sequences. This paper provides the first systematic zero-shot evaluation of frontier LLMs as goal recognisers on key classical PDDL benchmarks. Our results show that LLM competence on goal recognition is uneven: some models scale with evidence and approach landmark-based accuracy at full observations, while others remain anchored to world-knowledge priors regardless of how much evidence accumulates. Qualitative analysis of model reasoning traces reveals that this divergence reflects a fundamental difference in evidence integration rather than domain familiarity. These findings position goal recognition as a principled benchmark for the foundational planning knowledge of LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文首次对前沿大语言模型在经典PDDL规划领域作为目标识别器进行系统性零样本评估，发现LLM在目标识别任务上表现不均衡：部分模型能随证据积累提升准确率，另一些则固守世界知识先验，表明该任务可作为评估LLM规划知识基础能力的基准。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型在已知规划领域已接近经典规划器的性能水平，但其能力依赖于世界知识的利用而非真正的符号推理。目标识别作为溯因推理任务，其核心是评估与世界知识的一致性而非生成新的动作序列，在结构上更适合发挥LLM的优势，然而对此的研究尚属空白。
AI.method: 本文对前沿LLM在经典PDDL基准领域上作为目标识别器进行了首次系统性零样本评估，通过对比模型在不同观测证据量下的目标识别准确率与基于地标（landmark）的经典方法进行对照，并对模型推理轨迹进行定性分析以探究表现差异的根本原因。
AI.result: 实验结果表明LLM在目标识别上的能力存在显著分化：部分模型（如GPT-4）能够随观测证据增加而提升识别准确率，在全观测条件下接近基于地标的经典方法；而另一些模型则无论证据如何累积，始终固守其世界知识先验。定性分析显示，这种分化源于模型在证据整合能力上的根本差异，而非领域熟悉程度不同。
AI.conclusion: 目标识别任务可作为评估LLM规划知识基础能力的原则性基准，其核心在于区分模型是真正整合观测证据还是仅依赖世界知识先验。这一发现为理解LLM在推理任务中的真实能力边界提供了新的视角，并提示目标识别任务在评估和训练LLM推理能力方面具有重要价值。

title: RecMem: Recurrence-based Memory Consolidation for Efficient and Effective Long-Running LLM Agents
summary: Memory systems often organize user-agent interactions as retrievable external memory and are crucial for long-running agents by overcoming the limited context windows of LLMs. However, existing memory systems invoke LLMs to process every incoming interaction for memory extraction, and such an eager memory consolidation scheme leads to substantial token consumption. To tackle this problem, we propose RecMem by rethinking when memory consolidation should be conducted. RecMem stores incoming interactions in a subconscious memory layer and encode them using lightweight embedding models for retrieval. LLMs are only invoked to extract episodic and semantic memory when sustained recurrence are observed for semantically similar interactions. Such recurrence-based consolidation works because these interactions correspond to a semantic cluster with rich information and thus are worth extraction and summarization. To improve accuracy, RecMem also incorporates a semantic refinement mechanism that recovers the fine-grained facts omitted by memory extraction. Experiments show that RecMem reduces the memory construction token cost of three SOTA memory systems by up to 87% while exceeding their accuracy.

AI.tldr: RecMem通过重新思考记忆 consolidation 时机，仅在观测到持续重复的语义相似交互时才调用LLM进行记忆提取，从而将三个最先进记忆系统的记忆构建 token 成本降低高达87%，同时保持或超越其准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有记忆系统采用 eager consolidation 策略，对每一次传入的用户-智能体交互都调用LLM进行记忆提取，导致大量 token 消耗，在长期运行的智能体场景中问题尤为突出。
AI.method: RecMem引入潜意识记忆层存储原始交互，使用轻量级嵌入模型进行检索；仅当观测到语义相似交互的持续重复现象（即形成语义簇）时，才调用LLM提取情景记忆和语义记忆，并设计了语义细化机制恢复记忆提取中遗漏的细粒度事实以提升准确性。
AI.result: 实验表明，RecMem在三个最先进的记忆系统上将记忆构建的 token 成本降低高达87%，同时准确性超过原有系统。
AI.conclusion: 基于重复性触发的懒加载式记忆 consolidation 方案能显著降低 token 开销且不牺牲准确性，为构建更经济高效的长期智能体记忆系统提供了新思路。

title: A Generative AI Framework for Intelligent Utility Billing CO 2 Analytics and Sustainable Resource Optimisation
summary: Distribution utilities are now expected to deliver bills that customers can actually read attach a defensible carbon number to every kWh sold and schedule load against grid stress and emissions constraints We propose an end-to-end framework that unifies four production-grade capabilities under one architectural roof a generative-AI agent that drafts each customers natural-language billing statement from structured numeric inputs under a constrained decoding policy a transformer-based forecaster that supplies the day-ahead consumption estimate with calibrated quantile bands

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个端到端框架，将生成式AI账单起草、受约束解码策略、基于Transformer的日前负荷预测和校准分位数带四个生产级能力统一在同一架构下，以解决配电商在可读账单、碳排放核算和负荷调度方面的需求。
AI.motivation: 配电商面临三项关键挑战：向客户提供可读的自然语言账单、为每千瓦时售电分配可辩护的碳排放因子、以及根据电网压力和排放约束调度负荷。现有方案通常独立处理这些问题，缺乏统一且生产级可用的端到端架构。
AI.method: 提出一个包含四部分能力的统一框架：1）基于生成式AI的智能体，在受约束解码策略下将结构化数值输入转化为客户的自然语言账单陈述；2）基于Transformer的预测模型，提供日前消费估计并附带经过校准的分位数置信带。
AI.result: 目前摘要中未提供具体的实验指标或基准数据集上的定量结果，论文框架描述了四个生产级能力模块的设计与集成，但性能数据有待正文详述。
AI.conclusion: 该框架表明，将自然语言生成、概率负荷预测和碳排放核算整合为单一架构在技术上是可行的，为配电商提供了可审计、可读且环境感知的账单与调度解决方案，有望推动电力零售领域的AI全栈应用。

title: See Before You Code: Learning Visual Priors for Spatially Aware Educational Animation Generation
summary: Large language models can generate executable code for educational animations, but the resulting renders often exhibit visual defects, including element overlap, misalignment, and broken animation continuity. These defects cannot be reliably detected from the code alone and become apparent only after execution. We formalize this problem as render-feedback-aware constrained code generation: given a natural language specification, the model must generate executable code whose rendered output satisfies structured quality criteria that can be evaluated only after rendering. To address this problem, we introduce OmniManim, a render-feedback-aware educational animation generation framework built around a shared scene state, explicit visual planning, structured post-render diagnostics, and localized repair. Within OmniManim, the Vision Agent is a task-specific visual planning module: it predicts sparse keyframe layouts with coarse-to-fine bounding-box denoising and optimizes an interpolation-aware objective to reduce intermediate-frame failures induced by downstream animation interpolation. We further construct two datasets, ManimLayout-1K and EduRequire-500, and provide a reproducible evaluation protocol covering executability, instructional quality, visual quality, and efficiency. On EduRequire-500, OmniManim improves measured render quality over both single-model baselines and existing multi-agent frameworks. Systematic ablation studies further verify that explicit visual planning, especially its coarse spatial prior, bounding-box refinement, and interpolation-aware optimization, is central to these gains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 OmniManim，一个面向教育动画生成的渲染反馈感知框架，通过显式视觉规划、结构化后渲染诊断和局部修复，解决了大模型生成代码在渲染后出现的视觉缺陷问题，显著提升了渲染质量。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型虽能生成教育动画的执行代码，但渲染结果常出现元素重叠、对齐错误和动画不连续等视觉缺陷，这些缺陷无法仅从代码层面可靠检测，只能在渲染后才能被发现。现有方法缺乏对渲染后视觉质量的反馈机制，无法有效约束生成代码的渲染输出满足结构化质量要求。
AI.method: OmniManim 围绕共享场景状态、显式视觉规划、结构化后渲染诊断和局部修复构建框架；其中 Vision Agent 作为任务特异性视觉规划模块，通过粗到细的边界框去噪预测稀疏关键帧布局，并优化插值感知目标函数以减少下游动画插值导致的中间帧失败。
AI.result: 在 EduRequire-500 数据集上，OmniManim 在渲染质量上超越单模型基线和多智能体框架。消融实验验证了显式视觉规划（尤其是粗粒度空间先验、边界框细化和插值感知优化）对性能提升的核心作用；此外，论文构建了 ManimLayout-1K 和 EduRequire-500 两个数据集并提供了可复现的评估协议。
AI.conclusion: 显式的结构化视觉规划与渲染后反馈机制是提升教育动画代码生成质量的关键，该框架为可执行代码生成中视觉质量约束的自动化评估和修复提供了有效范式。

title: Look Before You Leap: Autonomous Exploration for LLM Agents
summary: Large language model based agents often fail in unfamiliar environments due to premature exploitation: a tendency to act on prior knowledge before acquiring sufficient environment-specific information. We identify autonomous exploration as a critical yet underexplored capability for building adaptive agents. To formalize and quantify this capability, we introduce Exploration Checkpoint Coverage, a verifiable metric that measures how broadly an agent discovers key states, objects, and affordances. Our systematic evaluation reveals that agents trained with standard task-oriented reinforcement learning consistently exhibit narrow and repetitive behaviors that impede downstream performance. To address this limitation, we develop a training strategy that interleaves task-execution rollouts and exploration rollouts, with each type of rollout optimized by its corresponding verifiable reward. Building on this training strategy, we propose the Explore-then-Act paradigm, which decouples information-gathering from task execution: agents first utilize an interaction budget to acquire grounded environmental knowledge, then leverage it for task resolution. Our results demonstrate that learning to systematically explore is imperative for building generalizable and real-world-ready agents.

AI.tldr: 提出Explore-then-Act范式，通过将探索与任务执行解耦并引入可验证的探索检查点覆盖度指标，解决基于LLM的智能体因过早利用先验知识而在陌生环境中表现不佳的问题。
AI.motivation: 基于大语言模型的智能体在陌生环境中常因"过早利用"（premature exploitation）而失败，即未充分获取环境特定信息就依赖先验知识行动；自主探索能力作为构建自适应智能体的关键能力尚未被充分研究，且缺乏形式化的量化指标。
AI.method: 提出探索检查点覆盖度（Exploration Checkpoint Coverage）作为可验证的量化指标；开发了一种交错式训练策略，交替执行任务型轨迹和探索型轨迹，各自使用对应的可验证奖励进行优化；基于此提出Explore-then-Act范式，将信息收集与任务执行解耦，智能体先用交互预算获取环境知识，再用于任务求解。
AI.result: 系统评估表明，使用标准面向任务的强化学习训练的智能体始终表现出狭窄且重复的行为模式，损害下游任务性能；训练策略和Explore-then-Act范式有效提升了智能体在新环境中的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 学习系统性探索对于构建可泛化且适用于现实世界的智能体至关重要；将探索与任务执行显式解耦能够克服过早利用问题，提升智能体在陌生环境中的适应性。

title: Context, Reasoning, and Hierarchy: A Cost-Performance Study of Compound LLM Agent Design in an Adversarial POMDP
summary: Deploying compound LLM agents in adversarial, partially observable sequential environments requires navigating several design dimensions: (1) what the agent sees, (2) how it reasons, and (3) how tasks are decomposed across components. Yet practitioners lack guidance on which design choices improve performance versus merely increase inference costs. We present a controlled study of compound LLM agent design in CybORG CAGE-2, a cyber defense environment modeled as a Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP). Reward is non-positive, so all configurations operate in a failure-mitigation mode. Our evaluation spans five model families, six models, and twelve configurations (3,475 episodes) with token-level cost accounting. We vary context representation (raw observations vs. a deterministic state-tracking layer with compressed history), deliberation (self-questioning, self-critique, and self-improvement tools, with optional chain-of-thought prompting), and hierarchical decomposition (monolithic ReAct vs. delegation to specialized sub-agents). We find that: (1) Programmatic state abstraction delivers the largest returns per token spent (RPTS), improving mean return by up to 76% over raw observations. (2) Distributing deliberation tools across a hierarchy degrades performance relative to hierarchy alone for all five model families, reaching up to 3.4$\times$ worse mean return while using 1.8-2.7$\times$ more tokens. We call this destructive pattern a deliberation cascade. (3) Hierarchical decomposition without deliberation achieves the best absolute performance for most models, and context engineering is generally more cost-effective than deliberation. These findings suggest a design principle for structured adversarial POMDPs: invest in programmatic infrastructure and clean task decomposition rather than deeper per-agent reasoning, as these strategies can interfere when combined.

AI.tldr: 对复合LLM智能体在对抗性部分可观测环境（CybORG CAGE-2）中的设计维度进行受控研究，发现程序化状态抽象带来最高性价比收益，层级分解优于深度推理，且将推理工具分布于层级中会导致"推理级联"这一破坏性模式。
AI.motivation: 在对抗性、部分可观测的序贯环境中部署复合LLM智能体涉及多个设计维度（观测内容、推理方式、任务分解），但实践者缺乏关于哪些设计选择真正提升性能而哪些仅增加推理成本的系统指导。
AI.method: 在CybORG CAGE-2（POMDP建模的网络安全环境）中，跨越5个模型家族、6个模型、12种配置（共3,475个回合）进行受控实验，变化上下文表示（原始观测 vs. 确定性状态追踪层+压缩历史）、推理策略（自问、自批判、自改进工具，可选思维链提示）和层级分解（单体ReAct vs. 委派给专业子智能体），并进行token级成本核算。
AI.result: 程序化状态抽象在每token回报（RPTS）上最高，平均回报相比原始观测提升高达76%；将推理工具分布于层级中导致所有5个模型家族性能下降（平均回报恶化最高达3.4倍，同时token消耗增加1.8-2.7倍），称为"推理级联"；无推理的层级分解在多数模型上取得最佳绝对性能，上下文工程通常比推理更具成本效益。
AI.conclusion: 在结构化的对抗性POMDP中，应优先投资于程序化基础设施和清晰的任务分解，而非更深的个体智能体推理，因为两者结合时可能相互干扰。这为复合LLM智能体设计提供了可操作的设计原则。

title: FORGE: Self-Evolving Agent Memory With No Weight Updates via Population Broadcast
summary: Can LLM agents improve decision-making through self-generated memory without gradient updates? We propose FORGE (Failure-Optimized Reflective Graduation and Evolution), a staged, population-based protocol that evolves prompt-injected natural-language memory for hierarchical ReAct agents. FORGE wraps a Reflexion-style inner loop, where a dedicated reflection agent (using the same underlying LLM, no distillation from a stronger model) converts failed trajectories into reusable knowledge artifacts: textual heuristics (Rules), few-shot demonstrations (Examples), or both (Mixed), with an outer loop that propagates the best-performing instance's memory to the population between stages and freezes converged instances via a graduation criterion. We evaluate on CybORG CAGE-2, a stochastic network-defense POMDP at a 30-step horizon against the B-line attacker, where all four tested LLM families (Gemini-2.5-Flash-Lite, Grok-4-Fast, Llama-4-Maverick, Qwen3-235B) exhibit strongly negative, heavy-tailed zero-shot rewards. Compared against both a zero-shot baseline and a Reflexion baseline (isolated single-stream learning), FORGE improves average evaluation return by 1.7-7.7$\times$ over zero-shot and by 29-72% over Reflexion in all 12 model-representation conditions, reducing major-failure rates (below $-100$) to as low as $\sim$1%. We find that (1) population broadcast is critical mechanism, with a no-graduation ablation confirming that broadcast carries the performance gains while graduation primarily saves compute; (2) Examples achieves the strongest returns for three of four models, Rules offers the best cost-reliability profile with $\sim$40% fewer tokens; and (3) weaker baseline models benefit disproportionately, suggesting FORGE may mitigate capability gaps rather than amplify strong models. All evidence is confined to CAGE-2 B-line; cross-family findings are directional evidence.

AI.tldr: FORGE是一种基于种群进化的记忆演化协议，通过反射循环将智能体的失败轨迹转化为提示注入的自然语言记忆（规则/示例），并结合种群广播与毕业机制，在无需梯度更新的条件下，使分层ReAct智能体在随机网络防御POMDP任务中的平均回报相较于零样本提升1.7-7.7倍、相较于Reflexion提升29-72%，且发现较弱基座模型受益更大。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体缺乏有效的机制在不进行梯度更新的条件下，通过自我生成的记忆持续改进决策能力，尤其是在随机部分可观测环境（POMDP）中，零样本LLM智能体表现极差且回报呈现重尾分布。本文旨在探索一种无需更强模型蒸馏或梯度更新，仅依赖智能体自身生成的记忆演化来提升决策性能的协议。
AI.method: FORGE采用分阶段种群演化协议，内层为Reflexion式反射循环，由专用反射智能体（与底层LLM相同，无蒸馏）将失败轨迹转换为三类知识工件：文本启发式规则（Rules）、少样本演示（Examples）或两者混合（Mixed）；外层循环在阶段间将表现最优实例的记忆广播至整个种群，并通过毕业准则冻结已收敛实例以节省计算资源。整体架构基于分层ReAct智能体，不涉及任何梯度更新。
AI.result: 在CybORG CAGE-2网络防御POMDP基准上，针对四种LLM系列（Gemini-2.5-Flash-Lite、Grok-4-Fast、Llama-4-Maverick、Qwen3-235B），FORGE在所有12种模型-记忆表示条件下，平均评估回报较零样本基线提升1.7-7.7倍，较Reflexion基线提升29-72%，并将主要失败率（回报低于-100）降至约1%。种群广播是性能提升的关键机制，毕业主要节省计算；Examples在三个模型中取得最强回报，Rules以约40%更少token提供最佳成本-可靠性权衡；较弱基座模型受益更大。
AI.conclusion: FORGE验证了无需梯度更新即可通过种群级记忆演化显著提升LLM智能体在复杂POMDP中的决策性能，其中种群广播机制是关键，且其对较弱模型更显著的提升效果暗示该协议可用于弥合能力差距而非放大强模型优势。研究结论限于CAGE-2 B-line场景，跨模型家族的发现仅提供方向性证据。

title: ALSO: Adversarial Online Strategy Optimization for Social Agents
summary: Social simulation provides a compelling testbed for studying social intelligence, where agents interact through multi-turn dialogues under evolving contexts and strategically adapting opponents. Such environments are inherently non-stationary, requiring agents to dynamically adjust their strategies over time. However, most Large Language Model (LLM) based social agents rely on static personas, while existing approaches for enhancing social intelligence, such as offline reinforcement learning or external planners, are ill-suited to these settings, typically assuming stationarity and incurring substantial training overhead. To bridge this gap, we propose \textbf{ALSO} (\textbf{A}dversarial on\textbf{L}ine \textbf{S}trategy \textbf{O}ptimization), the first framework for online strategy optimization in multi-agent social simulation. ALSO advances social adaptation through two key contributions. (1) ALSO formulates multi-turn interaction as an adversarial bandit problem, where combinations of static personas and dynamic strategy instructions are treated as arms, providing a principled solution to non-stationarity without relying on environmental stability assumptions. (2) To predict rewards and generalize sparse feedback in multi-turn dialogues, ALSO introduces a lightweight neural surrogate to predict rewards from interaction histories, enabling sample-efficient exploration and continuous online adaptation. Experiments on the Sotopia benchmark demonstrate that ALSO consistently outperforms static baselines and existing optimization methods in dynamic environments, validating the effectiveness of adversarial online strategy optimization for building robust social agents.

AI.tldr: 提出ALSO框架，将多智能体社交模拟中的多轮交互建模为对抗性赌博机问题，通过轻量级奖励预测神经网络实现非平稳环境下的在线策略优化，在Sotopia基准上超越静态基线和现有优化方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的社交智能体依赖静态人设，而离线强化学习或外部规划器等增强方法通常假设环境平稳并引入大量训练开销，难以适应多智能体对话中策略不断演化的非平稳特性，亟需一种不依赖平稳性假设的在线策略优化框架。
AI.method: ALSO框架将多轮交互形式化为对抗性赌博机问题，将静态人设与动态策略指令的组合视为臂（arms），从而在不依赖环境平稳性假设的前提下应对非平稳性；同时引入轻量级神经网络作为奖励预测器，从交互历史中预测奖励以泛化稀疏反馈，实现样本高效的连续在线自适应。
AI.result: 在Sotopia基准上的实验结果表明，ALSO在动态环境中持续优于静态基线和现有优化方法，验证了对抗性在线策略优化在构建鲁棒社交智能体方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ALSO通过将在线策略优化引入多智能体社交模拟，为非平稳对话环境的社交智能体学习提供了新的框架，证明了对抗性赌博机方法与轻量级奖励预测结合在动态社交交互中的适用性和鲁棒性。

title: SaaS-Bench: Can Computer-Use Agents Leverage Real-World SaaS to Solve Professional Workflows?
summary: Computer-Using Agents (CUAs) are rapidly extending large language models (LLMs) beyond text-based reasoning toward action execution in more complex environments, such as web browsers and graphical user interfaces (GUIs). However, existing web and GUI agent benchmarks often rely on simplified settings, isolated tasks, or short-horizon interactions, making it difficult to assess capabilities of agents in realistic professional workflows. Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) environments are a natural choice for CUA evaluation, as they host a large share of modern digital work and naturally involve dynamic system states, cross-application coordination, domain-specific knowledge, and long-horizon dependencies. To this end, we introduce SaaS-Bench, a benchmark built on 23 deployable SaaS systems across six professional domains, containing 106 tasks grounded in realistic work scenarios. These tasks require long-horizon execution, cover both text-only and multimodal settings, and are evaluated with weighted verification checkpoints that measure strict task completion and partial progress. Experiments show that representative LLM-based agents struggle on SaaS-Bench, with even the strongest model completing fewer than 4% of tasks end-to-end, exposing limitations in planning, state tracking, cross-application context maintenance, and error recovery. Code are available at https://github.com/UniPat-AI/SaaS-Bench for reproduction.

AI.tldr: SaaS-Bench是一个基于23个可部署SaaS系统和106个真实工作场景任务构建的基准测试，用于评估计算机使用代理（CUA）在长周期、跨应用和多模态环境中的能力，实验表明最强模型端到端任务完成率不足4%，暴露了当前LLM代理在规划、状态跟踪和错误恢复等方面的严重局限。
AI.motivation: 现有的网页和GUI代理基准测试通常依赖简化设置、孤立任务或短时交互，难以评估代理在真实专业工作流程中的能力，而SaaS环境因其动态系统状态、跨应用协调、领域特定知识和长周期依赖等特性，成为评估计算机使用代理（CUA）的自然选择，但目前缺乏针对性的基准。
AI.method: SaaS-Bench基于23个可部署的SaaS系统，覆盖六个专业领域，包含106个植根于真实工作场景的任务；任务需长周期执行、涵盖纯文本和多模态两种设置，并采用加权验证检查点来评估严格任务完成情况和部分进度。
AI.result: 在SaaS-Bench上，代表性LLM代理表现困难，最强模型端到端任务完成率不足4%，暴露出在规划、状态跟踪、跨应用上下文维护和错误恢复方面的局限性。
AI.conclusion: SaaS-Bench揭示了当前LLM代理在应对现实专业工作流程中的严重不足，尤其是在长周期执行、跨应用协调和错误恢复等关键能力上存在显著短板，为未来CUA研究提供了具有挑战性的评估基准和明确的改进方向。

title: Agentic Discovery of Neural Architectures: AIRA-Compose and AIRA-Design
summary: Toward recursive self-improvement, we investigate LLM agents autonomously designing foundation models beyond standard Transformers. We introduce a dual-framework approach: AIRA-Compose for high-level architecture search, and AIRA-Design for low-level mechanistic implementation. AIRA-Compose uses 11 agents to explore fundamental computational primitives under a 24-hour budget. Agents evaluate million-parameter candidates, extrapolating top designs to 350M, 1B, and 3B scales. This yields 14 architectures across two families: AIRAformers (Transformer-based) and AIRAhybrids (Transformer-Mamba). Pre-trained at 1B scale, these consistently outperform Llama 3.2 and Composer-found baselines. On downstream tasks, AIRAformer-D and AIRAhybrid-D improve accuracy by 2.4% and 3.8% over Llama 3.2. Furthermore, AIRA-Compose finds models with highly efficient scaling frontiers: AIRAformer-C scales 54% and 71% faster than Llama 3.2 and Composer's best Transformer, while AIRAhybrid-C outscales Nemotron-2 by 23% and Composer's best hybrid by 37%. AIRA-Design tasks 20 agents with writing novel attention mechanisms for long-range dependencies and high-performing training scripts. On the Long Range Arena benchmark, agent-designed architectures reach within 2.3% and 2.6% of human state-of-the-art on document matching and text classification. On the Autoresearch benchmark, Greedy Opus 4.5 achieves 0.968 validation bits-per-byte under a fixed time budget, surpassing the published minimum. Together, these frameworks show AI agents can autonomously discover architectures and algorithmic optimizations matching or surpassing hand-designed baselines. This establishes a powerful paradigm for discovering next-generation foundation models, marking a clear step toward recursive self-improvement.

AI.tldr: 本文提出双框架AIRA-Compose和AIRA-Design，使LLM智能体能够自主设计超越标准Transformer的基础模型架构与注意力机制，实验表明自动发现的架构在多项基准上匹配或超越人工设计，向递归自改进迈出关键一步。
AI.motivation: 现有基础模型架构（如Transformer）由人工设计，探索空间受限，且缺乏让AI智能体自主递归地改进自身底层模型架构的通用范式，亟需一种能由AI自主发现更优计算原语与架构的方法。
AI.method: 提出双框架方法：AIRA-Compose通过11个智能体在24小时预算内探索基本计算原语，评估百万参数候选设计并外推至350M、1B和3B规模，生成14种架构（AIRAformer和AIRAhybrid两个系列）；AIRA-Design则用20个智能体编写新型注意力机制与高性能训练脚本，专注于长程依赖问题。
AI.result: 在1B规模上预训练的AIRAformer-D和AIRAhybrid-D在下游任务中分别比Llama 3.2高2.4%和3.8%的准确率；AIRAformer-C的扩展速度比Llama 3.2快54%，比Composer的最佳Transformer快71%；AIRAhybrid-C比Nemotron-2快23%，比Composer最佳混合模型快37%；在Long Range Arena上，智能体设计的架构在文档匹配和文本分类任务中分别达到人类SOTA的2.3%和2.6%以内；Greedy Opus 4.5在Autoresearch基准上达到0.968验证bits-per-byte，超越已发表最优结果。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明AI智能体能够自主发现架构与算法优化，其性能匹配甚至超越人工设计的基线方法，为发现下一代基础模型建立了新范式，标志着向递归自改进目标迈出了重要一步。

title: Imperfect World Models are Exploitable
summary: We propose a novel definition of model exploitation in reinforcement learning. Informally, a world model is exploitable if it implies that one policy should be strictly preferred over another while the environment's true transition model implies the reverse. We analogize our definition with a prior characterization of reward hacking but show that the associated proof of inevitability does not transfer to exploitation. To overcome this obstruction, we develop a general theory of reward hacking and model exploitation that proves that exploitation is essentially unavoidable on large policy sets and yields the corresponding claim for hacking as a special case. Unfortunately, we also find that the conditions that guarantee unhackability in finite policy sets have no counterpart that precludes exploitation. Consequently, we introduce a relaxed notion of exploitation and derive a safe horizon within which it can be avoided. Taken together, our results establish a formal bridge between reward hacking and model exploitation and elucidate the limits of safe planning in world models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了强化学习中世界模型可利用性（model exploitation）的正式定义，建立了其与奖励黑客（reward hacking）之间的理论桥梁，证明了大规模策略集上可利用性的不可避免性，并引入宽松概念推导了可避免的安全范围。
AI.motivation: 现有研究虽然提出了奖励黑客的形式化定义并证明了其不可避免性，但世界模型的可利用性（即模型导致策略偏好与真实环境相悖）却缺乏类似的理论刻画，且已有证明方法无法直接迁移，亟需建立统一的理论框架来阐明两者的关系。
AI.method: 论文首先类比奖励黑客的定义提出了模型可利用性的新定义，然后通过分析两者在证明不可避免性时的核心差异，发展了一套统一的广义理论，该理论将奖励黑客作为特例包含在内。针对有限策略集上防止可利用性条件缺失的问题，进一步引入了宽松的可利用性概念并推导出可避免的安全视界。
AI.result: 理论分析表明，模型可利用性在大规模策略集上本质上是不可避免的，且该结论将奖励黑客的不可避免性作为特例涵盖；然而，有限策略集上保证无奖励黑客的条件无法推广到防止模型可利用性；通过引入宽松定义，论文推导出了可在有限安全视界内避免可利用性的条件。
AI.conclusion: 该研究正式建立了奖励黑客与模型可利用性之间的理论桥梁，揭示了基于世界模型进行安全规划的根本限制，为理解和防范强化学习中的模型偏差风险提供了理论基础。

title: PAGER: Bridging the Semantic-Execution Gap in Point-Precise Geometric GUI Control
summary: Large vision-language models have significantly advanced GUI agents, enabling executable interaction across web, mobile, and desktop interfaces. Yet these gains largely rely on a forgiving region-tolerant paradigm, where many nearby pixels inside the same component remain valid. Precise geometric construction breaks this assumption: actions must land on points in continuous canvas space rather than tolerant regions. Because geometric primitives carry ontological dependencies, a local coordinate error can induce cascading topological failures that distort downstream objects and invalidate the final construction. We identify this regime as precision-sensitive GUI tasks, requiring point-level accuracy, geometry-aware verification, and robustness to dependency-driven error propagation. To benchmark it, we introduce PAGE Bench, with 4,906 problems and over 224K process-supervised, pixel-level GUI actions. We further propose PAGER, a topology-aware agent that decomposes construction into dependency-structured planning and pixel-level execution. Pixel-grounded supervised tuning establishes executable action grammar, while precision-aligned reinforcement learning mitigates rollout-induced exposure bias through state-conditioned geometric feedback. Experiments reveal a pronounced Semantic-Execution Gap: general multimodal models can exceed 88% action type accuracy yet remain below 6% task success. PAGER closes this gap, delivering 4.1x higher task success than the strongest evaluated general baseline and raising step success rate from below 9% for GUI-specialized agents to over 62%, establishing a new state of the art for point-precise GUI control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PAGE Bench基准和PAGER智能体，专门针对需要点级精度和几何感知的精密GUI构建任务，揭示了通用多模态模型在动作类型准确率超过88%但任务成功率低于6%的语义-执行鸿沟，PAGER通过拓扑感知规划、像素级监督微调与精度对齐强化学习，将任务成功率提升至最强通用基线的4.1倍。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体大多基于区域容忍范式，即同一组件内邻近像素均可作为有效交互点，但精确几何构建任务要求动作必须落在连续画布空间的精确点上，且几何基元存在本体依赖关系，局部坐标误差会引发级联拓扑失效，导致下游目标畸变。现有工作缺乏对这种精度敏感型GUI任务的系统性基准测试和专用方法。
AI.method: PAGER采用拓扑感知的分治架构，将几何构建分解为依赖结构化的规划阶段和像素级执行阶段；通过像素级监督微调建立可执行动作文法，并引入精度对齐的强化学习，利用状态条件几何反馈缓解 rollout 导致的曝光偏差。
AI.result: PAGE Bench包含4,906个问题和超过22.4万条过程监督的像素级GUI动作。实验表明通用多模态模型动作类型准确率超过88%但任务成功率低于6%，PAGER将任务成功率提升至最强通用基线的4.1倍，并将步骤成功率从GUI专用智能体的9%以下提升至超过62%，达到点级精确GUI控制的最优水平。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了精密GUI任务中存在的语义-执行鸿沟，即模型理解交互类型但无法实现精确像素级执行，证明了拓扑感知的规划-执行分解与精度对齐强化学习是弥合该鸿沟的有效途径，为高精度GUI控制领域提供了新的基准和方向。

title: Learning Bilevel Policies over Symbolic World Models for Long-Horizon Planning
summary: We tackle the challenge of building embodied AI agents that can reliably solve long-horizon planning problems. Imitation learning from demonstrations has shown itself to be effective in training robots to solve a diversity of complex tasks requiring fine motor control and manipulation over low-level (LL), continuous environments. Yet, it remains a difficult endeavour to generate long-horizon plans from imitation learning alone. In contrast, high-level (HL), symbolic abstractions facilitate efficient and interpretable long-horizon planning. We propose to combine the strengths of LL imitation learning for manipulation and control, and HL symbolic abstractions for long-horizon planning. We realise this idea via \emph{bilevel policies} of the form $(π^{\mathrm{hl}}, π^{\mathrm{ll}})$, consisting of a neural policy $π^{\mathrm{ll}}$ learned from LL demonstrations, and an HL symbolic policy $π^{\mathrm{hl}}$ that is constructed from symbolic abstractions of the LL demonstrations combined with inductive generalisation. We implement these ideas in the BISON system. Experiments on extended MetaWorld benchmarks demonstrate that BISON generalises to long horizons and problems with greater numbers of objects than those solved by VLA and end-to-end methods, and is more time and memory efficient in training and inference. Notably, when ignoring LL execution, BISON's HL policies can solve HL problems with 10,000 relevant objects in under a minute. Project page: https://dillonzchen.github.io/bison

AI.tldr: 本文提出了BISON系统，通过双层策略架构将低层模仿学习与高层符号抽象规划相结合，在长时域操作任务上实现了超越VLA和端到端方法的泛化能力与效率，并能在忽略低层执行时于一分钟内解决包含10,000个相关对象的高层规划问题。
AI.motivation: 模仿学习在训练机器人完成需要精细运动控制和低层连续环境操作的任务上效果显著，但难以独立生成长时域规划；而高层符号抽象虽能实现高效且可解释的长时域规划，却缺乏低层控制能力。现有方法如VLA和端到端方法在长时域任务和大规模对象数量上泛化能力不足，且训练和推理效率较低。本文旨在结合低层模仿学习与高层符号抽象的优势，解决长时域复杂规划问题。
AI.method: 本文提出双层策略架构BISON，形式化为(π^{hl}, π^{ll})，其中π^{ll}为从低层演示中学习的神经策略，负责操作与控制；π^{hl}为高层符号策略，通过对低层演示的符号抽象结合归纳泛化构建而成。系统利用符号抽象实现高效的长时域规划，同时通过神经策略保证低层精细操作能力。
AI.result: 在扩展的MetaWorld基准测试上，BISON在长时域任务和包含更多对象数量的问题上均优于VLA和端到端方法，并在训练和推理阶段表现出更高的时间和内存效率。特别地，在忽略低层执行的情况下，BISON的高层策略能够在不到一分钟内解决包含10,000个相关对象的高层规划问题。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，将低层模仿学习与高层符号抽象规划相结合的双层策略范式能够有效弥合精细操作与长时域规划之间的鸿沟，在泛化能力和计算效率上均显著优于纯端到端或视觉-语言-动作方法，为构建能够可靠解决长时域规划问题的具身智能体提供了可行路径。

title: ScreenSearch: Uncertainty-Aware OS Exploration
summary: Desktop GUI agents operate under partial observability: visually similar screens can correspond to different underlying workflow states, so locally plausible actions can lead to sharply different outcomes. We frame this as a problem of computer/OS state exploration, where effective behavior requires both expanding the reachable frontier and reducing ambiguity before committing. We present ScreenSearch, a system that combines structural screen retrieval and deduplication with an ambiguity-aware PUCT graph-bandit for large-scale desktop exploration. The retrieval layer converts UIA trees into location-aware structural features, indexes related screens through sparse token search and metadata filters, and maintains a shared deduplicated state graph across VM workers. On top of this graph, we define a scalable ambiguity signal based on matched-action outcome dispersion. If similar screens produce different next states under the same action signature, the state should be probed further rather than treated as resolved. We use this signal together with frontier rewards to drive large-scale exploration and replay-start policy evaluation over the shared graph. Across 11 desktop applications, ScreenSearch collects over 1M screenshots and over 30K deduplicated states, yielding large exploration corpora with substantial cross-application and within-application diversity. On a fixed replay-start slice, we observe a clear novelty--ambiguity trade-off: some policies reduce ambiguity quickly while discovering little frontier. Ambiguity reduction alone is therefore not a sufficient exploration objective. Appendix ablations show that stronger proposal priors can materially improve unique-state discovery during corpus building. These results suggest that state identity, proposal quality, and ambiguity-aware search all matter when deciding when to probe and when to commit.

AI.tldr: ScreenSearch 提出了一种结合结构屏幕检索与去重、以及基于模糊感知的 PUCT 图赌博算法的桌面 GUI 代理系统，通过在大规模桌面环境中进行状态探索（1M+ 截图、30K+ 去重状态），揭示了新颖性-模糊性之间的权衡，并指出状态身份识别、提议质量与模糊感知搜索对于解决部分可观测性下的探索-利用决策至关重要。
AI.motivation: 桌面 GUI 代理在部分可观测环境下运行，视觉相似的屏幕可能对应不同的底层工作流状态，导致局部合理的动作产生截然不同的结果；现有方法缺乏系统性探索计算机/OS 状态空间的能力，未能有效扩展可达前沿与消除歧义，且对何时应深入探测、何时应提交决策缺乏理论指导。
AI.method: ScreenSearch 由两个核心层构成：检索层将 UIA 树转换为位置感知的结构特征，通过稀疏令牌搜索与元数据过滤器对相关屏幕进行索引，并在多个 VM 工作器间维护共享的去重状态图；在该图之上定义了一个基于匹配动作结果离散度的可扩展模糊信号，若相似屏幕在同一动作签名下产生不同的下一状态，则视为需要进一步探测，结合该模糊信号与前沿奖励驱动大规模探索，并采用重放-启动策略策略对共享图进行评估。
AI.result: 在 11 个桌面应用上，ScreenSearch 收集了超过 100 万张截图和 3 万个去重状态，生成了具有跨应用及应用内多样性的探索语料库；在固定的重放-启动切面上观察到了清晰的新颖性-模糊性权衡——某些策略快速降低了模糊性但几乎未发现新的前沿状态；附录消融实验表明，更强的提议先验能够在语料库构建过程中显著提升唯一状态的发现率。
AI.conclusion: 模糊性减少本身不足以作为探索目标，有效的桌面探索需要同时考虑状态身份识别、提议质量与模糊感知搜索；ScreenSearch 为部分可观测 GUI 环境下的系统性探索提供了可扩展框架，并揭示了探索过程中新颖性与模糊性之间的内在权衡，为设计更优的探索-利用决策策略提供了实证基础。

title: Unlocking Dense Metric Depth Estimation in VLMs
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) excel at 2D tasks such as grounding and captioning, yet remain limited in 3D understanding. A key limitation is their text-only supervision paradigm, which under-constrains fine-grained visual perception and prevents the recovery of dense geometry. Prior methods either distill geometry from external vision models, introducing error accumulation, or enable direct prediction with inefficient per-pixel query or coarse token-level outputs. In this paper, we propose DepthVLM, a simple yet effective framework that transforms a single VLM into a native dense geometry predictor while preserving its multimodal capability. By attaching a lightweight depth head to the LLM backbone and training under a unified vision-text supervision paradigm with a two-stage schedule, DepthVLM generates full-resolution depth maps alongside language outputs in a single forward pass. We further introduce a unified indoor-outdoor metric depth benchmark in a VLM-compatible format. Experiments show that DepthVLM significantly outperforms existing VLMs with higher inference efficiency, surpasses leading pure vision models, and improves complex 3D spatial reasoning, moving toward a truly unified foundation model. All code and checkpoints will be publicly released.

AI.tldr: DepthVLM 将单个视觉语言模型（VLM）转化为原生稠密几何预测器，通过附加轻量级深度头并在统一视觉-文本监督范式下两阶段训练，使其在保持多模态能力的同时，单次前向即可生成全分辨率深度图与语言输出，显著提升3D理解与空间推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在3D理解方面存在局限，主要因为其文本-only的监督范式难以约束细粒度视觉感知，无法恢复稠密几何结构。此前的方法要么蒸馏外部视觉模型导致误差累积，要么采用低效的逐像素查询或粗粒度的token级输出，缺乏高效且准确的解决方案。
AI.method: DepthVLM 提出在大型语言模型（LLM）骨干上附加一个轻量级深度头，并采用统一视觉-文本监督范式的两阶段训练策略，使模型在单次前向传播中同时生成全分辨率深度图与语言输出，无需额外外部模型或逐像素查询，从而将VLM原生转化为稠密几何预测器。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，DepthVLM 在室内外统一度量深度基准上显著优于现有VLM，且推理效率更高；同时超越了领先的纯视觉深度估计模型，并在复杂3D空间推理任务上展现出改进能力。
AI.conclusion: DepthVLM 表明，通过结构化的轻量扩展与统一的训练范式，VLM可以原生具备稠密几何预测能力而无需牺牲多模态性能，这为构建真正统一的视觉-语言-几何基础模型提供了可行方向，未来将公开全部代码与检查点。

title: ShopGym: An Integrated Framework for Realistic Simulation and Scalable Benchmarking of E-Commerce Web Agents
summary: Developing and evaluating e-commerce web agents requires environments that preserve meaningful task structure while enabling controllable, reproducible, and scalable scientific comparison. Existing methodologies force a tradeoff: live storefronts provide realism but are non-stationary, difficult to inspect, and irreproducible, while hand-built sandbox benchmarks provide control but cover only a narrow range of layouts, catalogs, policies, and interaction patterns. We argue that the core bottleneck is methodological: the field lacks a scalable way to construct evaluation settings that are simultaneously realistic, diverse, controllable, inspectable, and reproducible. We introduce ShopGym, an integrated framework for realistic simulation and scalable benchmarking of e-commerce web agents. ShopGym is a framework for constructing e-commerce simulation environments and grounded benchmark tasks. Its simulation layer, ShopArena, converts live seed storefronts into self-contained sandbox shops through anonymized shop specifications and a staged, validated generation process. On top of these simulated storefronts, ShopGuru synthesizes benchmark tasks across seven skill categories, grounding each task in the shop's catalog, navigation structure, policies, and interaction affordances. Together, ShopArena and ShopGuru produce self-contained, resettable, inspectable, and stable evaluation artifacts that preserve structural properties and agent-evaluation signals relevant to shopping tasks. We validate the framework through graph-based structural analysis and agent-based behavioral evaluation with 224 generated tasks across six sandbox shops: three constructed with synthetic data and three with real data. Our results show that the synthetic shops preserve key structural properties of live storefronts, with agent performance on synthetic shops positively correlated with performance on live storefronts.

AI.tldr: ShopGym是一个用于构建电商Web智能体仿真环境与可扩展基准测试的集成框架，通过ShopArena将在线店铺转化为可控沙箱环境，并利用ShopGuru合成跨七个技能类别的基准任务，在保持结构真实性的同时实现了可复现、可检查、可重置的评估。
AI.motivation: 现有电商Web智能体评估方法存在根本性权衡：在线店铺具有真实性但非平稳、难以检查且不可复现；手工构建的沙箱基准虽可控但覆盖范围窄，无法体现真实店铺的布局、目录、策略和交互模式多样性。该领域缺乏一种可扩展的方法来构建同时具备真实性、多样性、可控性、可检查性和可复现性的评估环境。
AI.method: ShopGym由两个核心组件构成：ShopArena作为仿真层，通过匿名化店铺规格说明和分阶段验证的生成流程，将在线种子店铺转化为自包含的沙箱店铺；ShopGuru作为任务合成层，基于店铺目录、导航结构、策略和交互能力，在七个技能类别上合成接地（grounded）的基准任务。两者共同产出自包含、可重置、可检查且稳定的评估工件，保留购物任务相关的结构属性和智能体评估信号。
AI.result: 通过基于图的结构分析和基于智能体的行为评估，在六个沙箱店铺（三个合成数据、三个真实数据）上生成了224个任务进行验证。结果表明，合成店铺保留了在线店铺的关键结构属性，且智能体在合成店铺上的表现与在在线店铺上的表现呈正相关。
AI.conclusion: ShopGym提供了一种可扩展的方法论框架，弥合了真实性与可控性之间的鸿沟，使电商Web智能体的评估同时具备科学严谨性和生态效度。合成店铺与在线店铺之间性能的正相关性验证了该框架的有效性，为未来电商智能体的标准化、可复现评估奠定了基础。

title: Invaria: Learning Scale and Density Invariance in Point Clouds via Next-Resolution Prediction
summary: Modern image encoders achieve high generalization by decoupling semantic meaning from resolution, an ability yet to be fully realized in the 3D domain. We investigate the failure of 3D point cloud encoders to achieve similar generalization and find that existing models are highly sensitive to sampling resolution and scale changes, leading to significant performance degradation. This sensitivity is a major bottleneck for real-world deployment in robotics, as it suggests models overfit to specific quantization densities and object scales rather than learning invariant semantic features.
