To mitigate this dependency, we propose Invaria, a point cloud encoder that achieves scale and density invariance through next-resolution prediction and receptive field calibration. While our objective is not the explicit generation of high-resolution point clouds, we find that this training objective encourages the model to learn robust, structural invariants. The resulting encoder achieves significant performance gains during resolution shifts while maintaining high efficiency through a compact model size and reduced token requirements. Specifically, on ScanNet, Invaria achieves a 56.0\% higher mIoU at 3$\times$ lower resolution and a 20\% improvement when the objects scale is reduced by a factor of 3. These gains are achieved with a 45\% smaller model size and an average reduction of 40\% in input tokens.

AI.tldr: Invaria是一种点云编码器，通过下一分辨率预测和感受野校准实现尺度与密度不变性，在扫描分辨率降低3倍时mIoU提升56%，模型尺寸减少45%，输入token减少40%。
AI.motivation: 现有3D点云编码器在采样分辨率和尺度变化时性能显著下降，因为它们过拟合于特定的量化密度和物体尺度，而非学习不变的语义特征，这成为机器人等真实场景部署的关键瓶颈。
AI.method: 本文提出Invaria点云编码器，通过下一分辨率预测（next-resolution prediction）和感受野校准（receptive field calibration）两种技术实现尺度与密度不变性，该训练目标虽非显式生成高分辨率点云，但能鼓励模型学习鲁棒的结构不变量，同时保持紧凑的模型尺寸和较少的输入token。
AI.result: 在ScanNet上，Invaria在3倍低分辨率下mIoU提升56.0%，在物体尺度缩小3倍时mIoU提升20%，同时模型尺寸减小45%，输入token平均减少40%。
AI.conclusion: 通过下一分辨率预测和感受野校准训练目标，可以在不生成高分辨率点云的情况下使编码器学习到尺度与密度的结构不变量，从而实现高效且鲁棒的3D表示，为点云编码器在复杂真实场景中的部署提供了可行方案。

title: Property-Guided LLM Program Synthesis for Planning
summary: LLMs have shown impressive success in program synthesis, discovering programs that surpass prior solutions. However, these approaches rely on simple numeric scores to signal program quality, such as the value of the solution or the number of passed tests. Because a score offers no guidance on why a program failed, the system must generate and evaluate many candidates hoping some succeed, increasing LLM inference and evaluation costs. We study a different approach: property-guided LLM program synthesis. Instead of scoring programs after evaluation, we check whether a candidate satisfies a formally defined property. When the property is violated, we stop the evaluation early and provide the LLM with a concrete counterexample showing exactly how the program failed. This feedback drastically reduces both the number of program generations and the evaluation cost, and can guide the LLM to generate stronger programs. We evaluate this approach on PDDL planning domains, asking the LLM to synthesize direct heuristic functions: every state reachable by strictly improving transitions has a strictly improving successor. A heuristic with this property leads hill-climbing algorithm directly to a goal state. A counterexample-guided repair loop generates one candidate program, checks the property over a training set, and returns the first case that violates the property. We evaluate our approach on ten planning domains with an out-of-distribution test set. The synthesized heuristics are effectively direct on virtually all test tasks, and compared to the best prior generation method our approach generates seven times fewer programs per domain on average, solves more tasks without using search, and requires several orders of magnitude less computation to evaluate candidates. Whenever a problem admits a verifiable property, property-guided LLM synthesis can reduce cost and improve program quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出属性引导的LLM程序合成方法，通过形式化属性检查与反例引导修复循环替代传统评分机制，在PDDL规划领域中显著减少程序生成次数、降低评估成本并提升合成启发式函数的质量。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的程序合成方法依赖简单数值评分（如解的值或通过测试数）来评判程序质量，但评分无法提供程序失败的具体原因，导致系统需要生成并评估大量候选程序，造成LLM推理和评估成本高昂。
AI.method: 提出属性引导的LLM程序合成方法：不是对程序进行事后评分，而是在评估过程中检查候选程序是否满足形式化定义的属性；一旦违反属性，立即终止评估并向LLM提供具体反例说明程序失败方式；该方法结合反例引导修复循环，每次生成一个候选程序，在训练集上检查属性，返回第一个违反属性的案例用于迭代修复。
AI.result: 在十个PDDL规划域上的实验表明，合成启发式函数在几乎所有测试任务上均具有直接性；与最佳先前生成方法相比，该方法平均每个域生成程序数量减少七倍，无需搜索即可解决的更多任务，且候选程序评估所需的计算量降低数个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 属性引导的LLM程序合成能够大幅降低程序生成与评估成本，同时提升合成程序质量；只要问题可以定义可验证的属性，该方法就具有广泛适用性，为高效、可靠的LLM驱动程序合成提供了新范式。

title: Segmentation, Detection and Explanation: A Unified Framework for CT Appearance Reasoning
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures, submitted to IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging (TMI)
summary: Recent progress in deep learning has significantly advanced CT image analysis, particularly for segmentation tasks. However, these advances are largely confined to image-level pattern recognition, with most methods lacking explicit anatomical or contextual reasoning. Large vision-language models introduce linguistic context into image analysis, yet most approaches typically focus on a single task, which is insufficient for clinical workflow analysis that requires multiple fine-grained types of analysis, such as anatomy detection and segmentation. In this paper, we propose a unified autoregressive framework that integrates language-guided visual reasoning into CT interpretation. Our method introduces task-routing tokens that trigger detection and segmentation heads conditioned on the hidden states of a large vision-language model, enabling coherent generation of visual outputs (e.g., masks and bounding boxes) and textual reasonings. To progressively enhance localisation accuracy and semantic clarity, we further design a "closer-look" mechanism that allows the model to perform progressive coarse-to-fine visits to regions of interest under refined fields of view. To support model training and evaluation, we curated a new multimodal CT dataset containing pixel-wise masks, bounding boxes, spatial prompts, and structured descriptions for visual objects constructed through an AI-assisted annotation process with human verification. Experiments on public benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements over the SoTA, achieving up to 1.0% Dice on BTCV and 1.7% Dice on MosMed+, while additionally providing appearance reasoning outputs. The code and dataset will be available.

AI.tldr: 提出一种统一的自回归框架，将语言引导的视觉推理引入CT图像分析，通过任务路由token和"closer-look"机制实现解剖结构检测、分割与文本推理的联合生成，在多个公开基准上取得SoTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在CT图像分割中主要局限于图像级模式识别，缺乏显式的解剖学或上下文推理能力；大型视觉-语言模型虽引入语言上下文，但大多聚焦单一任务，无法满足临床工作流中需要细粒度多类型分析（如解剖检测和分割）的需求。
AI.method: 提出统一自回归框架，集成语言引导的视觉推理到CT解读中：引入任务路由token，根据大视觉-语言模型的隐状态条件性地触发检测和分割头，实现视觉输出（掩码、边界框）与文本推理的连贯生成；设计"closer-look"机制，使模型能够以由粗到细的方式在细化视野下渐进聚焦感兴趣区域，逐步提升定位精度与语义清晰度；此外通过AI辅助注释与人工验证构建多模态CT数据集。
AI.result: 在BTCV上Dice提升1.0%，在MosMed+上Dice提升1.7%，均达到SoTA性能，同时额外生成外观推理输出。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，将语言引导的视觉推理与自回归框架结合，能够有效统一CT图像中多种细粒度分析任务，为临床工作流提供更全面、可解释的辅助诊断能力。

title: VideoSeeker: Incentivizing Instance-level Video Understanding via Native Agentic Tool Invocation
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have shown significant progress in video understanding, yet they face substantial challenges in tasks requiring precise spatiotemporal localization at the instance level. Existing methods primarily rely on text prompts for human-model interaction, but these prompts struggle to provide precise spatial and temporal references, resulting in poor user experience. Furthermore, current approaches typically decouple visual perception from language reasoning, centering reasoning around language rather than visual content, which limits the model's ability to proactively perceive fine-grained visual evidence. To address these challenges, we propose VideoSeeker, a novel paradigm for instance-level video understanding through visual prompts. VideoSeeker seamlessly integrates agentic reasoning with instance-level video understanding tasks, enabling the model to proactively perceive and retrieve relevant video segments on demand. We construct a four-stage fully automated data synthesis pipeline to efficiently generate large-scale, high-quality instance-level video data. We internalize tool-calling and proactive perception capabilities into the model via cold-start supervision and RL training, building a powerful video understanding model. Experiments demonstrate that our model achieves an average improvement of +13.7% over baselines on instance-level video understanding tasks, surpassing powerful closed-source models such as GPT-4o and Gemini-2.5-Pro, while also showing effective transferability on general video understanding benchmarks. The relevant datasets and code will be released publicly.

AI.tldr: 提出VideoSeeker，一种通过视觉提示实现实例级视频理解的新范式，将智能体推理与主动感知能力相结合，在实例级视频理解任务上平均提升+13.7%，超越GPT-4o和Gemini-2.5-Pro等闭源模型。
AI.motivation: 现有大型视觉语言模型在需要精确时空定位的实例级视频理解任务中表现不佳，主要因为文本提示难以提供精准的空间和时间参考，导致用户体验差；同时现有方法将视觉感知与语言推理解耦，使推理以语言而非视觉内容为中心，限制了模型主动感知细粒度视觉证据的能力。
AI.method: 提出VideoSeeker范式，通过视觉提示实现实例级视频理解，将智能体推理与实例级视频理解任务无缝集成，使模型能够按需主动感知和检索相关视频片段；构建四阶段全自动数据合成流水线以高效生成大规模高质量实例级视频数据；通过冷启动监督和强化学习训练将工具调用和主动感知能力内化到模型中。
AI.result: 在实例级视频理解任务上，模型平均比基线提升+13.7%，并超越GPT-4o和Gemini-2.5-Pro等强大闭源模型；同时在通用视频理解基准上展现出有效的迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 视觉提示范式结合智能体推理和强化学习训练能够有效解决实例级视频理解中精准时空定位的挑战，通过将主动感知能力内化到模型中，显著提升了细粒度视频理解性能，并为通用视频理解任务提供了可迁移的解决方案。

title: ReAlign: Generalizable Image Forgery Detection via Reasoning-Aligned Representation
summary: The rise of AI-generated images (AIGIs) poses growing challenges for digital authenticity, prompting the need for efficient, generalizable image forgery detection systems. Existing methods, whether non-LLM-based or LLM-based, exhibit distinct advantages and limitations. While non-LLM-based models offer efficient low-level artifact detection, they often lack semantic understanding. Conversely, LLM-based methods provide strong semantic reasoning and explainability but are computationally intensive and less sensitive to subtle visual artifacts. Moreover, the true contribution of explanatory reasoning texts to forgery detection performance remains unclear. In this work, we investigate the intrinsic value and potential of LLM-generated reasoning texts, considering it a source of generalization and semantic-error sensitivity. Based on these findings, we propose ReAlign, a novel framework that distills high-quality reasoning texts generated by a GRPO-optimized LLM into a lightweight AIGI detector via contrastive learning. ReAlign effectively inherits the generalization ability and semantic sensitivity capability of reasoning textual representations, while remaining efficient and lightweight for deployment. Moreover, ReAlign adopts a tailored joint optimization strategy that integrates contrastive loss for image-text alignment and classification loss for accurate forgery discrimination. Experimental results on AIGCDetectBenchmark, AIGI-Holmes, and our newly constructed UltraSynth-10k demonstrate that ReAlign consistently outperforms existing state-of-the-art detectors in both accuracy and generalization, particularly when facing complex, high-fidelity forgeries from modern generative models.

AI.tldr: 提出ReAlign框架，通过GRPO优化的LLM生成高质量推理文本，并利用对比学习将其蒸馏至轻量级AIGI检测器，在保持高效部署的同时，在AIGCDetectBenchmark、AIGI-Holmes和UltraSynth-10k上全面超越现有最先进方法。
AI.motivation: 现有AIGI检测方法中，基于非LLM的方法虽能高效检测低级伪影但缺乏语义理解，而基于LLM的方法虽具备强语义推理能力但计算开销大且对细微视觉伪影不敏感；此外，LLM生成的可解释性推理文本对检测性能的真实贡献尚不明确，亟需探索如何有效利用推理文本的泛化能力和语义敏感性同时保持检测器的高效性。
AI.method: 提出ReAlign框架，首先利用GRPO优化的大语言模型生成高质量推理文本，然后通过对比学习将推理文本的表征知识蒸馏至轻量级AIGI检测器中；框架采用联合优化策略，结合对比损失实现图像-文本对齐，以及分类损失实现精确的伪造鉴别。
AI.result: 在AIGCDetectBenchmark、AIGI-Holmes以及新构建的UltraSynth-10k数据集上，ReAlign在检测准确率和泛化能力上均一致优于现有最先进的检测器，尤其面对现代生成模型产生的高保真复杂伪造图像时表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明LLM生成的推理文本本身具备泛化能力和语义错误敏感性，通过蒸馏方式可以有效继承这些能力，从而在轻量级检测器中同时实现高效部署与高精度检测；该工作为融合大语言模型推理能力与高效视觉检测提供了新的范式。

title: WeatherOcc3D: VLM-Assisted Adverse Weather Aware 3D Semantic Occupancy Prediction
summary: While multi-modal 3D semantic occupancy prediction typically enhances robustness by fusing camera and LiDAR inputs, its effectiveness is fundamentally constrained by environmental variability. Specifically, camera sensors suffer from severe low-light degradation, while LiDAR sensors encounter significant backscatter noise during heavy precipitation. These adverse conditions create a modality trust problem, as static fusion strategies fail to adaptively re-weight inputs when a specific sensor becomes unreliable. To address this, we propose a VLM-assisted framework leveraging the pre-trained CLIP latent space to guide multi-sensor integration via linguistic environmental cues. We utilize a parameter-efficient adapter to align weather-specific text embeddings with sensor features, coupled with a gating strategy that decomposes environmental uncertainty into two factors: visibility and illumination. This enables the model to dynamically modulate the fusion ratio - prioritizing semantic camera features in clear daylight and shifting to geometric LiDAR priors during rainy nights. Evaluations on the nuScenes dataset demonstrate the versatility of our approach, as implementing our proposed framework on the OccMamba and M-CONet architectures achieves mIoU scores of 26.3 and 21.1, respectively, significantly outperforming their traditional baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出一种VLM辅助的框架，利用预训练CLIP潜空间通过语言环境线索动态引导多传感器融合，解决恶劣天气下相机与LiDAR可靠性变化导致的模态信任问题，在nuScenes数据集上显著提升3D语义占用预测性能。
AI.motivation: 多模态3D语义占用预测中，相机在低光照下退化严重，LiDAR在强降水下受后向散射噪声影响，静态融合策略无法根据传感器可靠性自适应调整权重，导致恶劣环境下融合性能严重下降。
AI.method: 提出VLM辅助框架，利用预训练CLIP潜空间通过语言环境线索指导多传感器融合；使用参数高效适配器对齐天气特定文本嵌入与传感器特征，并设计门控策略将环境不确定性分解为可见度和光照两个因子，动态调整融合比例——在晴朗白天优先使用语义相机特征，在雨夜转向几何LiDAR先验。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，将所提框架分别集成到OccMamba和M-CONet架构中，获得26.3和21.1的mIoU分数，显著优于各自的传统基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 利用VLM的语言理解能力编码环境状态，可有效解决多模态融合中的模态信任问题；将环境不确定性显式分解为可见度和光照两个因子，使模型能在不同天气条件下自适应调节传感器融合权重，为恶劣环境下多模态感知提供了可行范式的改进方向。

title: Res$^2$CLIP: Few-Shot Generalist Anomaly Detection with Residual-to-Residual Alignment
summary: Few-shot Generalist Anomaly Detection requires models to generalize to novel categories without retraining, posing significant challenges in real-world scenarios with scarce samples and rapidly changing categories. Existing CLIP-based methods face two major challenges: coarse-grained unified text prompts struggle to adapt to fine-grained foreground-background differences, causing cross-granularity mismatch; and fine-tuning on auxiliary datasets disrupts CLIP's inherent open-world generalization due to domain shift, leading to cross-category generalization degradation. To address these, we propose to shift multimodal alignment entirely into a unified residual space, where residual representations naturally eliminate fine-grained normal feature differences across regions and class-specific biases, simultaneously resolving both problems. Based on this insight, Res$^2$CLIP, the first residual-to-residual alignment framework that symmetrically bridges visual and text modalities within CLIP's residual space, is designed. The framework is developed from a residual perspective into three branches: a text prompt-based branch, a visual prompt-based branch, and a novel residual-to-residual alignment branch. All learnable optimizations are constrained within the residual domain, and the residual alignment optimization objectives are designed to force the model to focus on relative anomaly deviations rather than optimizing class-specific features. Experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our architecture. The code is available at https://github.com/hito2448/Res2CLIP.

AI.tldr: Res²CLIP 提出了一种残差到残差的多模态对齐框架，通过将 CLIP 的视觉-文本对齐完全迁移到统一的残差空间中，在少量样本泛化异常检测任务中同时解决了跨粒度不匹配和跨类别泛化退化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于 CLIP 的少样本泛化异常检测方法面临两大挑战：粗粒度的统一文本提示难以适应细粒度的前景-背景差异，导致跨粒度不匹配；在辅助数据集上微调会因域偏移破坏 CLIP 固有的开放世界泛化能力，造成跨类别泛化退化。现有方法无法同时解决这两个问题。
AI.method: Res²CLIP 是首个将视觉与文本模态在 CLIP 残差空间中进行对称对齐的残差到残差对齐框架。该框架从残差视角构建三个分支：基于文本提示的分支、基于视觉提示的分支以及新颖的残差到残差对齐分支；所有可学习优化均被限制在残差域内，并通过残差对齐优化目标迫使模型关注相对异常偏差而非优化类别特定特征。
AI.result: 在多个少样本泛化异常检测数据集上的实验结果表明，Res²CLIP 框架在检测性能上显著优于现有方法，有效缓解了跨粒度不匹配和跨类别泛化退化问题，验证了残差对齐策略在处理少样本与快速变化类别场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 将多模态对齐完全迁移到统一的残差空间中可以同时消除跨区域细粒度正常特征差异和类别特定偏置，从而在保持 CLIP 开放世界泛化能力的同时实现高效的少样本泛化异常检测。该工作为基于预训练视觉-语言模型的异常检测提供了新的残差域优化范式。

title: VLMs Trace Without Tracking: Diagnosing Failures in Visual Path Following
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) achieve strong performance on multimodal benchmarks, but may still lack robust control over basic visual operations. We study \textit{line tracing}, where a model must follow a selected visual path through successive local continuations. To isolate this ability, we design controlled tracing tasks that introduce nearby competitors while reducing semantic and topological ambiguity such as crossings and overlaps. Across these tasks, even state-of-the-art VLMs frequently lose the target path and switch to nearby alternatives, especially when those alternatives look locally similar to the target. Behavioral interventions and internal analyses indicate that these failures arise from local competition: nearby similar distractors pull the model away from the true continuation. Standard remedies do not remove this bottleneck: model-size scaling provides only limited gains, reasoning partially compensates through costly substitute strategies, and explicit tracing instructions fail to recover stable path following. Finally, tests on tangled-cable scenes and metro maps with richer visual complexity show that the same path-switching failure persists beyond our controlled settings.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了视觉-语言模型在"线条追踪"任务中的能力瓶颈，发现即使是当前最先进的VLM也容易在局部相似竞争路径干扰下发生路径切换，且模型缩放、推理增强和指令优化等标准手段均无法有效解决这一根本性缺陷。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉-语言模型在多模态基准测试中表现优异，但其对基本视觉操作（如沿选定路径进行连续局部延续）的鲁棒控制能力仍存疑，现有研究缺乏针对此类底层视觉推理能力的系统评估与失效分析。
AI.method: 论文设计了受控线条追踪任务，通过引入邻近竞争路径并减少交叉、重叠等语义和拓扑歧义来隔离评估VLM的路径跟随能力；结合行为干预实验、内部表征分析以及标准缓解策略（模型缩放、推理增强、显式指令）的系统对比来进行诊断。
AI.result: 实验表明，即使是顶级VLM也频繁丢失目标路径并切换到局部相似的竞争路径；模型缩放仅带来有限增益，思维链推理可通过代价高昂的替代策略部分补偿但无法根治，显式追踪指令完全无效；该路径切换失效现象在真实复杂场景（如缠绕电缆、地铁线路图）中同样存在。
AI.conclusion: VLM在基础视觉操作中的失败根源在于局部竞争机制——邻近的相似干扰项会将模型从正确延续路径上拉离，现有通用改进手段无法突破这一瓶颈，表明当前VLM在底层视觉推理方面存在根本性且系统性的能力局限。

title: Offline Semantic Guidance for Efficient Vision-Language-Action Policy Distillation
summary: Billion-parameter Vision-Language-Action (VLA) policies have recently shown impressive performance in robotic manipulation, yet their size and inference cost remain major obstacles for real-time closed-loop control. We introduce \textbf{VLA-AD}, a distillation framework that uses a Vision-Language Model as an offline semantic supervisor to transfer large VLA teachers into lightweight student policies. Instead of relying only on low-level action imitation, VLA-AD augments teacher-provided 7-DoF action targets with high-level semantic guidance, including task phase anchors and multi-frame operating-direction descriptions. These auxiliary signals are used only during training: at test time, the student policy runs independently, with neither the VLA teacher nor the VLM required. We evaluate VLA-AD on three LIBERO benchmark suites. Using OpenVLA-7B as the teacher, our method produces a 158M-parameter student, yielding a $44\times$ reduction in model size while matching the teacher with only a $0.27\%$ average relative gap. The resulting policy runs at 12.5 Hz on an RTX 4090, achieving a $3.28\times$ inference speedup over OpenVLA-7B. We further show that the same semantic distillation pipeline generalizes to a different $π_{0.5}$-4B teacher, where the student outperforms the teacher on two suites and remains within $0.53\%$ on \texttt{libero\_goal}. Additional analysis indicates that phase-level supervision and multi-frame directional cues make the student less sensitive to noisy teacher actions, such as erroneous high-frequency gripper changes. Overall, VLA-AD demonstrates that offline semantic guidance from VLMs can substantially improve the efficiency, robustness, and deployability of VLA policy distillation.

AI.tldr: 提出VLA-AD蒸馏框架，利用VLM作为离线语义监督器，将大规模VLA教师模型蒸馏为轻量学生策略，在LIBERO基准上以44倍模型压缩和3.28倍推理加速实现与教师模型相当的操控性能。
AI.motivation: 亿级参数的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）策略在机器人操作中表现优异，但其巨大的模型尺寸和推理成本严重阻碍了实时闭环控制的实际部署。
AI.method: VLA-AD使用视觉语言模型（VLM）作为离线语义监督器，在训练过程中除了教师模型提供的7-DoF动作目标外，还引入任务阶段锚点（phase anchors）和多帧操作方向描述（multi-frame operating-direction descriptions）作为高层语义引导信号；学生策略在测试时独立运行，无需VLA教师或VLM参与。
AI.result: 以OpenVLA-7B为教师，蒸馏出158M参数的轻量学生策略，实现44倍模型压缩且平均性能差距仅0.27%；在RTX 4090上运行频率达12.5 Hz，推理速度提升3.28倍；该框架可推广至π0.5-4B教师，学生在两个子套件上超越教师；语义蒸馏使学生对教师动作噪声（如高频夹爪错误开关）更不敏感。
AI.conclusion: VLM提供的离线语义引导能够显著提升VLA策略蒸馏的效率、鲁棒性和可部署性，为大规模VLA模型在实际机器人系统中的轻量化落地提供了有效路径。

title: DiLA: Disentangled Latent Action World Models
summary: Latent Action Models (LAMs) enable the learning of world models from unlabeled video by inferring abstract actions between consecutive frames. However, LAMs face a fundamental trade-off between action abstraction and generation fidelity. Existing methods typically circumvent this issue by using two-stage training with pre-trained world models or by limiting predictions to optical flow. In this paper, we introduce DiLA, a novel Disentangled Latent Action world model that aims to resolve this trade-off via content-structure disentanglement. Our key insight is that disentanglement and latent action learning are co-evolving: the predictive bottleneck inherent in latent action learning serves as a driving force for disentanglement, compelling the model to distill spatial layouts into the structure pathway while offloading visual details to a separate content pathway for generation. This synergy yields a continuous, semantically structured latent action space without compromising generative quality. DiLA achieves superior results in video generation quality, action transfer, visual planning, and manifold interpretability. These findings establish DiLA as a unified framework that simultaneously achieves high-level action abstraction and high-fidelity generation, advancing the frontier of self-supervised world model learning.

AI.tldr: DiLA提出了一种基于内容-结构解耦的潜在动作世界模型，通过将预测瓶颈作为解耦驱动力的协同机制，在高层次动作抽象与高保真视频生成之间取得了统一，无需两阶段训练或预训练世界模型。
AI.motivation: 潜在的潜在动作模型（LAMs）在动作抽象与生成保真度之间存在根本性权衡，现有方法通常依赖两阶段训练或预训练世界模型来规避这一问题，但未能从根本上解决这一矛盾。
AI.method: DiLA通过内容-结构解耦（content-structure disentanglement）来化解动作抽象与生成保真度之间的权衡；其核心洞见在于解耦与潜在动作学习具有协同进化关系——潜在动作学习中固有的预测瓶颈充当解耦的驱动力，迫使模型将空间布局蒸馏到结构通路（structure pathway），同时将视觉细节卸载到独立的内容通路（content pathway）用于生成，从而在不牺牲生成质量的前提下得到一个连续且语义结构化的潜在动作空间。
AI.result: DiLA在视频生成质量、动作迁移、视觉规划以及流形可解释性方面均取得了优于现有方法的结果，证明了在高层次动作抽象与高保真生成之间实现了统一。
AI.conclusion: DiLA建立了一个统一的框架，同时实现了高层次动作抽象与高保真生成能力，推进了自监督世界模型学习的前沿，并为潜在动作模型中的解耦学习提供了新的理论视角。

title: UAM: A Dual-Stream Perspective on Forgetting in VLA Training
summary: Vision--language--action (VLA) models are typically built by fine-tuning a pretrained vision--language model (VLM) on action data. However, we show that this standard recipe systematically erodes the VLM's multimodal competence, a side effect we call the embodiment tax. But do VLAs have to forget? Inspired by the two-stream organization of biological vision, we trace this degradation to a structural bottleneck: current VLAs ask a single encoder to support both language-grounded semantics and control-relevant visual features, whereas biological vision separates recognition and visuomotor control into distinct pathways. Building on this view, we propose the Unified Action Model (UAM), which adds a parallel Dorsal Expert, an analog of the brain's dorsal pathway. To make the Dorsal Expert an effective second pathway and reduce the control-learning burden on the VLM, we initialize it from a pretrained generative model and train it with a mid-level reasoning objective that predicts visual dynamics. This design allows us to train the whole VLA end-to-end on action data alone: with no parameter freezing, no gradient stopping, and no auxiliary VL co-training, UAM retains over $95\%$ of the underlying VLM's multimodal capability and at the same time achieves the highest average success rate among baselines on a variety of manipulation tasks that probe out-of-distribution generalization, including unseen objects, novel object--target compositions, and instruction variation. Together, these results suggest that semantic preservation in VLAs can emerge from architectural separation itself, rather than being enforced by frozen weights or auxiliary data replay, and that this preserved semantic capability can naturally transfer from VLMs to semantic generalization in actions.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示VLA模型微调会导致VLM多模态能力系统性退化的“具身税”现象，并受生物视觉双通路启发，提出并行添加背侧专家（Dorsal Expert）的UAM架构，在不冻结参数或辅助训练的情况下保留95%以上VLM能力，同时在多种操控泛化任务上取得最高平均成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型通过微调预训练VLM构建，但该范式会系统性侵蚀VLM的多模态能力，作者将此现象称为“具身税”（embodiment tax）。作者追溯其根源在于结构瓶颈：当前VLA用单一编码器同时支撑语言语义与操控相关的视觉特征，而生物视觉系统则将识别与视觉运动控制分离为不同通路，因此需要一种能保留语义能力同时有效学习动作的架构设计。
AI.method: 作者提出统一动作模型（UAM），在VLM基础上并行添加一个模拟生物背侧通路的背侧专家（Dorsal Expert）。该专家从预训练生成模型初始化，并采用预测视觉动态的中层推理目标进行训练，使其成为有效的第二通路，从而降低VLM的控制学习负担。整个模型仅在动作数据上进行端到端训练，不冻结参数、不停止梯度、不进行辅助的视觉-语言联合训练。
AI.result: UAM在多种操控任务上达到基线中最高的平均成功率，尤其在外分布泛化场景（包括未见物体、新颖目标-物体组合、指令变化）中表现优异。同时，UAM保留了底层VLM超过95%的多模态能力，证明了语义保持可以从架构分离本身涌现，而非依赖于冻结权重或数据回放。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，语义保留可以通过架构上的分离设计自然实现，这意味着VLM中保存的语义能力可以自然迁移到动作的语义泛化中，为构建不牺牲多模态能力的VLA模型提供了新的设计范式，即通过分离识别与控制的处理通路来解决具身税问题。

title: BiomedAP: A Vision-Informed Dual-Anchor Framework with Gated Cross-Modal Fusion for Robust Medical Vision-Language Adaptation
summary:
Biomedical Vision--Language Models (VLMs) have shown remarkable promise in few-shot medical diagnosis but face a critical bottleneck: \textit{fragility to prompt variations}.Existing adaptation frameworks typically optimize visual and textual prompts as independent streams, relying on ideal ``Golden Prompts''. In clinical reality, where descriptions are often noisy and heterogeneous, this modality isolation leads to unstable cross-modal alignment.
  To address this, we propose BiomedAP, a vision-informed dual-anchor framework with gated cross-modal fusion.BiomedAP enforces synergistic alignment through two mechanisms: (1) Gated Cross-Modal Fusion, which enables layer-wise interaction between modalities, acting as a dynamic noise regulator to suppress irrelevant textual cues; and (2) a Dual-Anchor Constraint that regularizes learnable prompts toward stable semantic centroids derived from both expert templates (High Anchors) and few-shot visual prototypes (Low Anchors).
  Extensive experiments across 11 benchmarks demonstrate that BiomedAP consistently surpasses baselines, achieving competitive few-shot accuracy and markedly enhanced robustness under prompt perturbations.
  Our code is available at: https://github.com/tongdiedie/BiomedAP.
  Keywords: Vision-Language Models; Prompt Learning; Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning; Few-shot Learning

AI.tldr: 提出BiomedAP，一种视觉引导的双锚点框架，通过门控跨模态融合与双锚点约束，解决生物医学视觉-语言模型在少样本诊断中对提示变体的脆弱性问题，在11个基准上实现更强的鲁棒性与竞争性准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有的生物医学视觉-语言模型（VLM）在少样本诊断中性能优异，但对提示变体（prompt variations）高度脆弱，即对噪声和异质性的文本描述缺乏鲁棒性。现有的适应框架通常将视觉和文本提示作为独立流进行优化，依赖理想的“黄金提示”（Golden Prompts），导致跨模态对齐不稳定。
AI.method: BiomedAP提出视觉引导的双锚点框架，核心包含两个机制：(1) 门控跨模态融合（Gated Cross-Modal Fusion），实现层级的模态间交互，作为动态噪声调节器，抑制无关文本线索；(2) 双锚点约束（Dual-Anchor Constraint），将可学习提示正则化到稳定的语义质心，该质心由专家模板（高锚点）和少样本视觉原型（低锚点）共同定义。
AI.result: 在11个基准数据集上的大量实验表明，BiomedAP在所有基线方法上一致超越，在少样本准确率上具有竞争力，同时在提示扰动下显著增强了鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: BiomedAP通过融合视觉信息引导跨模态对齐，有效解决了VLM在临床噪声环境下的提示脆弱性问题，验证了模态协同而非独立优化对于稳定跨模态表示的重要性，为生物医学少样本诊断中的参数高效微调提供了新思路。
